title: Outreach Coordinator
description:
JOB OVERVIEW:  We are building a mission-driven outreach system focused on helping individuals and families gain financial clarity, reduce debt, and create more freedom in their lives. We are inviting churches and organizations across the United States to host a free 1-hour workshop titled “The Accelerated Mortgage & Student Loan Elimination Method. ”The workshop is presented by Larry Cheatham, President of Alliance Apex Solutions Inc., a highly respected financial educator, entrepreneur, investor, and speaker. A former professional firefighter, Larry has spoken to audiences of thousands across the country and has delivered high-value financial training to leadership teams at multimillion-dollar companies. He brings decades of real-world experience and a genuine passion for helping families achieve biblical financial freedom through practical stewardship. This practical, faith-based workshop teaches families how to pay off a 30-year mortgage in 7–10 years and eliminate student loans faster — all while using the exact same monthly budget they already have. No refinancing, no gimmicks, and no lifestyle changes. 



We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Outreach Coordinator to help us connect with churches and organizations across the United States. This is a long-term opportunity for someone who communicates well, follows instructions, and takes pride in doing meaningful work.



HOURS:

• Part-Time: 4 hours/day

• Monday–Friday

• 20 hours/week  



PAY:

• $400–$500/month

• Paid bi-weekly or monthly

• Opportunity for increases based on performance  



YOUR ROLE:

You will help us reach churches and organizations by sending personalized outreach
s inviting pastors and leaders to host the free workshop for their congregation. This is NOT spam or mass
 work. Each message is personalized and written with care.



DAILY RESPONSIBILITIES:

• Research churches and organizations (U.S.-based)

• Identify decision-makers (Pastors, Leaders, Coordinators)

• Personalize pre-written outreach
s

• Send 15–20
s per day

• Manage follow-up messages

• Respond to interested organizations

• Book calls on our calendar

• Track all activity in Google Sheets  



TARGET ORGANIZATIONS:

• Churches (Senior Pastors, Ministry Leaders)

• Adult small groups (men’s, women’s, marriage groups)

• Community organizations

• Professional groups and associations  



REQUIRED SKILLS:

• Strong written English (clear, natural, respectful tone)

• Ability to follow instructions exactly

• Attention to detail

• Comfortable using Google Sheets and
 tools

• Reliable internet connection

• Consistent daily availability  



IDEAL CANDIDATE:

You are someone who:

• Communicates in a warm, respectful, and natural way

• Understands how to speak professionally to church leaders

• Takes initiative and ownership

• Is organized and consistent

• Enjoys meaningful, purpose-driven work  



REQUIRED WRITING TEST (VERY IMPORTANT):  Write a short outreach
 to:  Pastor Michael Johnson at Grace Community 

Church.



Your
 should:

• Be warm and respectful

• Feel personal (not generic)

• Mention the free workshop titled “The Accelerated Mortgage & Student Loan Elimination Method” presented by Larry Cheatham and briefly explain its value to the congregation

• Be written in your own words

• Be no more than 6–8 sentences  



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (READ CAREFULLY):  You must follow ALL instructions below or your application will NOT be considered:



Subject Line – Outreach Coordinator Application – [Your Name]  

Writing Test – Include your
 to “Pastor Michael Johnson” at the TOP of your application  



Short Answer – In 1–2 sentences, tell us: Why does this role interest you personally?  

Experience – List any experience you have with:

•
 outreach

• Virtual assistant work

• Research or lead generation  



Confirmation Line – At the end of your application, write: “I follow instructions carefully and pay attention to details.”



HOW WE SELECT CANDIDATES:



We review applications based on:

• Writing quality and tone

• Ability to follow instructions

• Attention to detail

• Personalization effort

• Professional communication  



NEXT STEPS:

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a short Zoom interview.

We are looking to hire quickly and begin onboarding within a few days.

title: Marketing & Growth Specialist
description:
Marketing & Growth Specialist (Social Media, Ads & Strategy)

We focus on results-driven marketing, not just posting content.

We operate multiple established brands within the photography industry in Australia, with an active presence across
 and Instagram.

We are starting with approximately 25 hours per week, with the intention to ramp up to full-time in the near future.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Social Media Management

Plan and schedule content for
 and Instagram

 and Instagram)

APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (IMPORTANT)



To be considered, you must

recruitment [at] freedomphotography [dot] com [dot] au

FINAL NOTE

title: Amazon Operations Executive
description:
Job Post — Amazon Operations Specialist

(Full-Time, Remote • Philippines)



Post this on OnlineJobs.ph. This is an execution role with real accountability — not a “checker.”



About the role

We run high-volume Amazon marketplaces and need a full-time operator to keep inventory in stock, shipments clean, and inbound discrepancies recovered. You will own the daily ops queue, work with our team, and keep everything tracked.



Schedule: Full-time (40 hrs/week).

Time zone: Overlap with Pacific Time is required.



What you will do (core responsibilities)



• Replenishment execution: Monitor Days of Cover on priority SKUs, create replenishment tickets, coordinate with warehouse/3PL, and track inbound through check-in.

• Inbound tracking: Maintain shipment tracker (working ? shipped ? delivered ? receiving ? checked-in).

• Receive discrepancy recovery: Reconcile shipped vs received by SKU, compile evidence packs, open cases, and follow up until reimbursed or resolved.

• Marketplace health queue: Address stranded inventory, search suppressed listings, pricing errors, coupon status, broken variations, image issues, and content gaps (titles/bullets).

• Case management: Write clean cases with evidence, track SLAs, escalate properly, and maintain a case log.

• Weekly reporting: Revenue-at-risk (stockouts/suppressions), what you fixed, what’s pending, blockers, and next actions.



KPIs (how you’ll be measured)



• Priority SKUs: No preventable stockouts (you escalate early).

• Inbound: 100% shipments tracked end-to-end with key dates.

• Claims: No missed claim windows; consistent follow-up until closure.

• Listing health: Suppressions/critical issues kept low and resolved quickly.

• Communication: Clear daily updates and weekly summaries; no surprises.



Requirements (do not apply if you don’t have these)



• 2+ years hands-on Seller Central experience (inventory, cases, listings).

• Strong understanding of FBA inbound workflows (shipments, receiving, discrepancies).

• Ability to build and maintain trackers (Google Sheets) with clean data discipline.

• Excellent written English for Amazon cases (clear, concise, evidence-driven).

• Reliable internet and ability to work independently without constant supervision.



Nice to have



• Experience with flat files, variation repairs, A+ content updates.

• Experience managing US and CA marketplaces.

• Experience with 3PL coordination and outbound shipment scheduling.



Application instructions (filter out weak applicants)



Reply with:

- A short summary of your Amazon operations experience (marketplaces, size of catalog).

- Your exact experience with FBA receive discrepancies (what evidence you use, how you follow up).

- A sample case message you would send to Amazon for missing units.

- Your internet speed and your available working hours overlapping with Pacific Time.

- Put the code word “CLEAN-OPS” in the first line so we know you read the post.



Compensation

Competitive for the Philippines market, based on experience. We reward operators who close loops and protect revenue.



If you’re the type who just “checks things,” don’t apply. If you can diagnose issues, run tickets, and close cases fast — apply.

description:

Position Title: OpenClaw & Claude AI Developer

About the Role

We are seeking a skilled and innovative OpenClaw & Claude AI Developer to join our team on a part-time basis. This role is responsible for designing, building, deploying, and maintaining AI-driven assistants, automations, and workflows using OpenClaw and Claude AI.



The ideal candidate will have strong experience in AI application development, prompt engineering, workflow automation, API integrations, and deploying practical AI solutions that improve productivity, customer engagement, and internal operations.



Key Responsibilities

- Design, build, and maintain AI assistants and automated workflows using OpenClaw and Claude.

- Develop and optimise prompts, tools, and agent behaviours for business and operational use cases.

- Integrate AI solutions with internal systems, third-party platforms, messaging tools, CRMs, and web applications.

- Configure and manage OpenClaw environments, deployments, and supporting infrastructure.

- Work with Anthropic Claude models via API and implement secure, scalable usage patterns.

- Test, troubleshoot, and improve AI workflow reliability, response quality, and performance.

- Monitor usage, outputs, and automation effectiveness to identify improvement opportunities.

- Implement guardrails, access controls, and quality checks to ensure safe and accurate AI operations.

- Collaborate with business stakeholders to gather requirements and translate them into functional AI solutions.

- Document architecture, prompts, integrations, and workflow logic for ongoing maintenance and scalability.



Skills and Qualifications

- Proven experience in AI application development, automation, or agent-based workflow design.

- Hands-on experience with Claude AI / Anthropic API.

- Experience working with OpenClaw or similar AI agent / orchestration platforms.

- Strong knowledge of JavaScript / TypeScript, Python, or both.

- Experience with API integrations, JSON, webhooks, and backend logic.

- Familiarity with cloud or self-hosted deployment environments, Docker, and Linux-based systems.

- Strong understanding of prompt engineering, tool calling, and AI workflow design.

- Experience with data handling, security controls, and operational monitoring.

- Ability to debug complex automation issues across multiple systems.

- Strong written and verbal communication skills.



Preferred Qualifications

- Experience building AI copilots, assistants, or workflow automation tools for business use cases.

- Familiarity with messaging and productivity platform integrations.

- Experience with vector databases, RAG pipelines, or knowledge-base-connected assistants.

- Understanding of AI governance, privacy, and responsible AI implementation.

- Experience working in a startup, product, or innovation-focused environment.



Personal Attributes

- Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking.

- Self-motivated and capable of working independently in a part-time role.

- Detail-oriented with a focus on quality and reliability.

- Curious, adaptable, and proactive in exploring emerging AI capabilities.

- Commercially minded, with the ability to build practical solutions that deliver business value.



What We Offer

Flexible part-time working arrangement.

Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI solutions and automation initiatives.

Collaborative and innovative team environment.

Exposure to real-world AI deployment and product development.

Ongoing opportunities for learning and growth in applied AI.



Optional Add-On: Success Measures

- Delivery of reliable AI workflows and assistants.

- Improvement in automation efficiency and response quality.

- Successful integration of Claude-powered solutions into business operations.

- Clear documentation and maintainable AI system architecture.

title: FUNNEL BUILDER (Part-time)
description:
FUNNEL BUILDER (Part-time)



We’re hiring a Funnel Builder who knows how to architect, build, and optimize conversion-focused funnels using GoHighLevel and automation tools like 
 and Zapier.

This role is for someone who thinks in systems, understands how cold traffic behaves, and builds funnels cleanly and correctly. You are here to design, deploy, and improve funnels. Your priorities are CRO, reliable automation, and creating a magical client experience from the first time someone interacts with our brand.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. 



The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM! 



Our Team Core Values:



DELIGHT THE CLIENT: We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.   



MASTER YOUR CRAFT: We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.



FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS: When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important, and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just managing marketing campaigns for our real estate business.





--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you think like a funnel and conversion architect? Do you enjoy structuring systems, workflows, and sales psychology that drives measurable results? Are you obsessed with improving KPIs by designing experiments and running tests? Do you take pride in building things properly the first time while still iterating and optimizing?

Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities: Funnel Architecture, Buildout & Optimization

Build complete funnels inside GoHighLevel focused on lead generation.

Structure landing pages with conversion principles and user psychology in mind.

Create and customize pages, forms, surveys, and
 templates.

Embed forms, manage page layouts, and ensure clean user flow across multiple devices (mobile responsiveness).

Maintain proper tagging architecture and funnel logic to ensure data remains organized.



Automations, Workflows & Integrations



Build and maintain complex workflows, automations, and multi-step nurturing sequences.

Implement conditional logic and clean, tag-based trigger systems.

Create 
 or Zapier automations to bridge gaps between platforms.

Integrate APIs and third-party tools where required to streamline operations.

Set up UTM parameters and verify that all traffic source links are functioning correctly.



Tracking, Optimization & Testing

Implement Meta Pixel, Google Analytics, and Google Tag Manager events.

Ensure accurate tracking and data flow from the first click to the final conversion.

Apply an A/B testing mindset to improve landing page and
 conversion rates.

Optimize funnels over time based on hard performance data and lead-quality KPIs.



Campaign Systems & Deployment

Maintain clean, scalable campaign structures within the CRM.

Collaborate with leadership on funnel improvements and testing plans.

Stay up to date on funnel best practices to brainstorm and recommend ecosystem improvements.



Requirements:

STRONG hands-on experience with GoHighLevel, required.

Recent experience with workflows, automations, tags, and sequences, required.

Experience building lead generation funnels (not ecom or dropshipping), required.

Experience with 
 and/or Zapier automations, required.

Understanding of conversion rate optimization (CRO) and buyer behavior, required.

Ability to think in systems and campaign logic, required.

Clean build habits (organized naming conventions, no messy workflows), required.

Strong English communication skills; near-native preferred for testing copy.

A stable, high-speed internet connection (at least 150mbps), required.

Growth mindset, required.



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



Meta Ads, Google Ads, or media buying familiarity.

Advanced Meta Pixel, GA4, and GTM setup experience.

Basic SEO understanding for landing pages.

Custom CSS/HTML for GoHighLevel page styling.

NOTE: This is a part-time role (5–15 hrs/week) with the opportunity to grow into a full-time position for the right person.



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---



STEP 1: Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.

As part of your application, include a Loom or YouTube video (2 minutes or less) explaining why you believe you’re a strong fit for this specific Funnel Builder role and showing a brief glimpse of a clean workflow or funnel you've built.







STEP 2: Qualified candidates may be invited to an interview.



STEP 3: The hiring stage requires 1 former employer/team lead reference and 1 character reference. These will be verified before an offer is extended.

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant – Data & Research (Wholesale)
description:
Real Estate Virtual Assistant – Data & Research (Wholesale)

We're a Florida-based real estate wholesaling company operating in Broward County. We find off-market properties in probate, pre-foreclosure, and eviction situations — and we move fast. The foundation of everything we do is clean, accurate, well-organized data. That's where you come in.



This is a data and research role only — no cold calling, no sales. Your job is simple in concept but critical in execution: make sure every record we have is accurate, properly tagged, and ready to act on. One wrong address or missed phone number costs us a real deal. We take this seriously, and we need someone who does too.



What You'll Be Doing:



Pulling property and case records from county clerk websites (probate, eviction, pre-foreclosure)

Uploading and cleaning records in our CRM (REISift)

Skiptracing owners and heirs.

Adding phone numbers with the correct relationship tags (owner, spouse, relative, etc.)

Cross-referencing property appraiser websites to verify addresses before upload

Marking disconnected numbers correctly in the system

Tracking and updating mail attempts in our CRM

Submitting a daily progress report with screenshots of completed work



What We're Looking For



Excellent written and spoken English

Sharp attention to detail — you catch errors before they become problems

Experience with data research, skip tracing, or real estate is a strong plus

Comfortable learning new software and websites quickly

Reliable internet connection and a dedicated working setup

Available during US Eastern Time hours

Proactive communicator who takes ownership without needing to be micromanaged

Freelancers only — we are not working with agencies or teams



What We Offer



$6/hr starting rate

Starting at 20 hours/week, but will grow to full-time with longer hours within 90 days as you learn the role

Raise after 90 days based on performance — we reward people who show up and deliver

$100 bonus for every deal that closes from your data — your work directly impacts results

Direct access to the owner — you matter here, you are not a ticket in a queue

Full training provided through short Loom video SOPs

A real long-term position for the right person — we invest in people who invest in us



To Apply

We don't want your resume right now. We want to hear you.

Please send a 2–3 minute video to 
 with the subject line "Heritage VA Application" answering these questions — this is your chance to stand out, so take it seriously:



Tell me about your previous work experience. What did you like about it, and why did you leave or why are you currently looking?

What do you know about the real estate industry? Any direct experience?

What are you not good at, or what type of work do you not enjoy?

Is there anything that would prevent you from being consistent with your hours day to day?

How many clients or employers are you currently working with?

What tools and software do you use regularly in your work?



Video applications only. No resume needed at this stage.

title: Administrative Assistant (Construction / Engineering – Remote)
description:
We are a structural engineering consultancy based on the Gold Coast, Australia, specialising in high-end residential and multi-storey projects.



We are seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Administrative Assistant to support our growing team.



This is a long-term remote role with consistent work.



Responsibilities:

Managing incoming and outgoing email

Preparing and issuing fee proposals/quotes based on provided templates

Issuing invoices and tracking payments

Maintaining project records and filing systems

Assisting with document formatting and reports

Data entry and general administrative support

Requirements:

Strong written English and communication skills

High attention to detail

Previous administrative experience

Ability to follow templates and instructions accurately

Reliable internet connection and home office setup

Ability to work during Australian business hours (preferred)



Experience with Xero is essential. WorkflowMax, and/or working with construction/engineering companies will be highly regarded but is not essential.



Important:



This role follows established systems and processes. Training will be provided, however attention to detail and reliability are critical.



Accuracy is essential, particularly when preparing quotes and invoices.



We are looking for someone that is experienced, organised, consistent, and able to work with minimal supervision over time.



To apply, please include:

A short introduction about yourself

A summary of your previous experience relevant to this role

Details of your experience with Xero, including your level of proficiency

Your hourly rate (in AUD)

Your current availability, including hours per week and start date



Please include the word “ICON” in your application so we know you have read this.

title: Sales Supervisor / Team Lead – Merchant Services & POS (Work From Home | Philippines)
description:
Location: Philippines (Remote / Work From Home)

Market: United States (U.S. Restaurants & Businesses)

Industry: Food Service, POS Systems, and Credit Card Merchant Services

Position Overview

We are looking for an experienced Sales Supervisor / Team Lead to oversee sales representatives and support staff serving U.S.-based restaurants and businesses. This is a leadership role for someone who knows how to manage people, monitor performance, support customers, and keep a team accountable.

This is not an entry-level role. We need someone who can lead from the front, oversee daily operations, help staff improve, and make sure the team delivers results.

Knowledge of credit card merchant services and POS systems is a strong plus.

What the Team Sells

Private-label hot sauce for restaurants

Specialty bakery and bread products

POS systems

Credit card merchant services

These are established products and services with strong sales potential in the U.S. market.

Key Responsibilities

Supervise and oversee sales representatives and other staff

Monitor daily call activity, follow-up, productivity, and overall performance

Coach tea
mbers on sales process, objection handling, and closing techniques

Make sure staff follow company procedures, scripts, and customer service standards

Support customers and help resolve issues or escalations when needed

Oversee merchant services and POS-related opportunities handled by the team

Review CRM entries, call notes, and sales reports for accuracy and consistency

Track team goals, sales targets, and performance metrics

Assist with staff training, development, and ongoing performance improvement

Help maintain a professional, organized, and results-driven work environment

Work Schedule

Monday to Friday

8:00 AM to 5:00 PM Central Time

Full-time | Work from Home

Requirements

Minimum 5 years of management experience

At least 5 years of direct experience managing other employees

Proven experience supervising sales staff, customer-facing staff, or support teams

Strong leadership and people-management skills

Experience handling customer concerns and overseeing staff performance

Excellent spoken and written English

Comfortable working with U.S.-based customers and teams

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Reliable internet connection and quiet home workspace

Preferred Qualifications

Knowledge of credit card merchant services

Experience with POS systems

Background in B2B sales

Restaurant, food service, or merchant services experience

Experience managing remote teams

Compensation & Growth

Fixed base salary

Performance-based bonuses

Long-term growth opportunities

Training and support provided

Who Should Apply

Apply if you are an experienced leader who knows how to manage people, support customers, improve team performance, and hold staff accountable.

Do Not Apply If

Do not apply if you do not have management experience, have never supervised staff, or are looking for a non-leadership role.

title: Virtual Assistant YouTube Manager
description:
Are you detail oriented and a clear communicator? We are looking for a YouTube manager to proofread video scripts and quality check YouTube videos for our faceless YouTube channels. The purpose of this role is to ensure our scripts and videos are polished, engaging, and ready to go viral. This role also involves communication with teams, uploading finalized videos to our YouTube channels, and ensuring every detail is accurate and optimized for success.



If you have an eye for catching errors, improving content, communicating feedback, and understanding how  YouTube works, we’d love to have you on our team!



Responsibilities:

- Script Review: Proofread scripts and provide constructive feedback to writers.

- Video Review: Watch videos to check for errors and note discrepancies, and provide clear feedback.

- Team Management: Maintain strong communication with the freelance team of writers and video editors, in addition to maintaining our SOPs up to date.

- Video Uploading: Upload finalized videos to the YouTube channels with titles, descriptions, tags, end screens, and thumbnails.



Requirements:

- Experience in proofreading, editing, or writing.

- Experience in video editing faceless videos.

- MUST have strong attention to detail.

- Understand the fundamentals of YouTube CTR, retention, and hooks.

- Clear and professional communication skills for giving feedback and communicating with the team.

- Complete a QC test to assess your skills.



Pay:

- $3 USD per hour

- Paid on the 1st and 15th of every month.

- Must have a Payoneer in your name linked to onlinejobs.

- Growth opportunity based on performance.

- About 20 - 30 hours a week and flexible hours.



If you are interested, just send a quick message with your experience and "YTMA26" as the subject, so we know you are serious. If you have the experience we are looking for, we will send you the application/ test task link.



We appreciate all applicants, and we look forward to hearing from you!

title: Sales Admin Analyst (FMCG experience needed)
description:
Sales Admin Analyst.



Premium Australian BPO is seeking an experienced Sales Support Analyst for our client, a global Fast-Moving-Consumer-Goods (FMCG) company specializing in personal care products and brands.



This Full-Time role offers the flexibility of Working-From-Home (WFH) during AUS business hours. Also offering a market leading salary package- including paid leave and + bonuses. Join this global FMCG company, as a key player on their AUS sales teams.



This role represents an incredible opportunity for both professional and personal growth and to fast-track your career on a global stage.





****Key Responsibilities Include****



* Supporting the National Business Manager (NBM) with key data administrative tasks.

* Inputting key data into Trade Promotion Management (TPM) systems- specifically, Promax- ensuring data integrity and accuracy.

* Accurate transfer of data from various sources into TPM/Promax systems.

* Maintenance of baselines, promotions, pricing, forecasts and ensuring data integrity- what is loaded in Promax matches what is loaded in customer portals / promotional advice forms.

* Providing key insights on data.

* Identifying issues/discrepancies with data.

* Reviewing forecast accuracy versus business plans.

* Attending Pre S&OP Forecast meetings to take action notes and reflect actions/changes in Promax.

* Assisting with data Audit requirements. Data matching from various sources.

* Complete promotional reconciliation weekly or as required (Scan promotions vs accrued Scan monies) and provide written feedback on if the promotion met expectations, was below or above expectations.

* Help prepare comprehensive sales data reports in Excel. Weekly & Monthly Sales Reports categorized by SKU, account, and area, ensuring accuracy and timeliness.

* Using Excel for data entry and data analysis. Pivot Tables, V Lookups, Sum & Average.





****Key Requirements MUST HAVES include****



* Strong background in sales and strong understanding of key sales principles. Including maintenance of baselines, promotions, pricing and forecasting.

* Expertise in Excel. Advanced functions including Pivot Tables, V Lookups, Sum & Average.

* Excellent communication and comprehension skills.

* Highest level of proficiency in English, both written and verbal.

* Ability to work as part of a cross functional team.

* Meticulous attention to detail.

* Highly Analytical- able to interpret data, provide some analysis and data-driven recommendations.

* Highly organized- able to juggle multiple tasks, meeting timelines and deadlines.

* Attentive, communicative, analytical and energetic. A problem-solver who can work independently and as part of a dynamic team.



****IDEAL candidates have****

* 2 + years proven previous experience within the fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) industry.

*Have experience with Trade Promotion Management Systems (TPM) such as Promax, SAP or Oracle.

title: Media Relations Specialist
description:
Media Relations Specialist for U.S. PR Agency



PLEASE NOTE: This role is for a media relations specialist to pitch U.S. media. We are only able to consider applicants who have previous hands-on experience pitching and securing earned media coverage in U.S. media outlets. 



About Us



We are a B2B PR and marketing agency based in the US, helping our B2B clients achieve their marketing goals. We're looking for a talented and experienced media relations specialist to join our team.



The Role



As a media relations specialist, you will play a critical role in securing media coverage for our B2B clients in the US market. You will develop and execute strategic media relations campaigns to raise brand awareness, generate leads, and position our clients as thought leaders in their industries.



Responsibilities:



- Research and identify relevant media outlets in the US for our B2B clients.

- Develop targeted media pitches and press releases tailored to each outlet.

- Build and maintain relationships with journalists and editors in the US media landscape.

- Secure media placements for our clients in online, print, and broadcast media.

- Monitor media coverage and provide reports on campaign performance.

- Stay up-to-date on industry trends and best practices in B2B media relations.



Qualifications:



- Minimum 3 years of experience in media relations or public relations, preferably with a focus on B2B clients.

- Strong understanding of the US media landscape, including trade publications and online media outlets.

- Excellent writing and communication skills, with the ability to craft compelling press releases and media pitches.

- Proven ability to build and maintain positive relationships with media contacts.

- Experience with media monitoring tools a plus.

- Familiarity with time zone differences and ability to work effectively with a US-based team.

- Self-motivated, organized, and able to manage multiple projects simultaneously.



Benefits



- Competitive hourly rate (negotiable based on experience)

- Remote work with flexible work schedule

- Opportunity to work with a diverse range of B2B clients

- Be part of a growing and dynamic agency



To Apply



Please submit your resume, cover letter, and writing sample (press release or media pitch) to 
 your cover letter, please tell us why you're interested in this role and how your experience makes you a strong fit for our team.



Note: This is a 1099 independent contractor position. You will be responsible for your own taxes and benefits.

title: Remote Operations Manager — Singapore Events & Catering Group
description:

Our brands cover Indian weddings, catering, corporate events, floral, videography, and more. The CEO needs a sharp, disciplined operations person to oversee daily execution across teams so he can focus on growth.

What You'll Do

This is not a typical VA role. You will be the CEO's eyes and ears across the business daily.



Morning check-in with all teams: admin, designers, SEO, marketing, sales, on-site crew

Verify daily scope of work is being executed — not just assigned, but completed

Track all incoming leads for two main brands and report conversion numbers daily

Submit a structured end-of-day report every single day by 7pm SGT — no exceptions

Chase outstanding tasks, follow up on deliverables, flag delays before they become problems

Monitor staff performance against weekly KPIs and escalate issues

Coordinate with remote tea
mbers across India and Philippines

Manage vendor follow-ups, invoicing reminders, and client communication where needed

Prepare weekly scorecards showing green/amber/red status per team



You Must Have



Minimum 3 years experience in operations, project management, or team oversight (not data entry or admin-only roles)

Experience managing or coordinating teams of 5+ people remotely

Excellent spoken and written English

Comfortable with WhatsApp, Google Sheets, Excel, Slack, or similar tools

Ability to hold people accountable firmly but professionally

Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

Available to start within 2 weeks



Bonus (Not Required)



Experience working with Singapore, Australia, or Middle East-based companies

Familiarity with events, weddings, or F&B industry

Experience with CRM tools or lead tracking systems



What We Offer



PHP 35,000–45,000 base depending on experience

Long-term full-time role — we are not looking for freelancers

Direct reporting to the CEO

Send a short message answering these three questions:

title: GHL Marketing and Automation Specialist
description:
WHO WE ARE

7-Figure Educator® provides Black educators with the coaching, content, curriculum, and community necessary to grow six and seven figure education consulting businesses.



WHY WE DO WHAT WE DO

We do this work because we are passionate about school leadership, equity, and supporting Black educators to build their wealth.



POSITION OVERVIEW

7-Figure Educator® is hiring a CRM Marketing & Automation Specialist. The CRM Marketing & Automation Specialist is responsible for the hands-on execution of marketing campaigns and lead management workflows inside the company’s CRM platform (GoHighLevel). This role ensures that marketing strategy is translated into high-performing technical builds that support top-of-funnel lead generation, nurture sequences, and the sales pipeline.This role will report to our Manager of Marketing & Content Strategy and partner with all functions. 



This is a primarily tactical role with a strong focus on marketing automation, campaign deployment, CRM pipeline management, and performance tracking. The ideal candidate is both detail-oriented and systems-minded, with the ability to recommend the most effective technical approach to bring marketing funnels to life.



Key Responsibilities

CRM & Marketing Automation Execution

- Building and updating sales pages inside GoHighLevel

- Build, launch, and maintain funnels, workflows, and automations inside GoHighLevel

- Configure forms, schedulers, landing pages, triggers, campaigns, and pipeline stages

- Implement
 and SMS campaigns using provided strategy, messaging, and assets

- Set up lead routing, tagging, segmentation, and scoring to support marketing and sales efforts

- Ensure all automations are tested, QA’d, and deployed accurately

- Manage CRM hygiene including tag accuracy, contact card updates, etc.



Campaign & Lead Management

- Manage the CRM components of top-of-funnel marketing campaigns

- Connect lead sources (ads, landing pages, website, and integrations) into the CRM

- Monitor and optimize lead flow from capture through handoff to sales

- Maintain and improve nurture sequences to increase conversion rates

- Support the execution of product launches and promotional campaigns



Sales Pipeline & Process Support

- Build and maintain pipelines that reflect the company’s sales process

- Automate task assignments, follow-ups, and internal notifications

- Ensure accurate tracking of opportunities, customer journeys, and conversion points



Data, Reporting & Optimization

- Track and report on campaign performance (opens, clicks, conversions, lead movement)

- Maintain CRM data hygiene and list health

- Identify workflow issues and performance gaps and recommend improvements

- Create and maintain simple dashboards and reporting views



Technical Strategy (Light – 10–15%)

- Recommend the most effective and scalable way to build funnels and automations

- Identify opportunities to improve efficiency through better system configuration

- Research and test new automation features and integrations



Job Qualifications

- Minimum of 2 years of hands-on experience building and managing CRM or marketing automation systems

- Demonstrated experience with GoHighLevel and GHL SaaS configurator (required)

- Experience executing
 and/or SMS marketing campaigns within a CRM

- Knowledge of A2P compliance requirements

- Strong understanding of:

1. Automation workflows and triggers

2. Pipeline management

3. Lead lifecycle and segmentation

- Excellent communication across multiple function departments

- Ability to translate marketing plans into technical builds

- Strong QA and troubleshooting skills

- Excellent organizational and project management ability (Experience with ClickUp a plus)

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, collaborative remote environment

- Experience supporting lead generation and product launch campaigns

- Familiarity with marketing analytics and conversion tracking

- Experience integrating third-party tools via native integrations, Zapier, or webhooks



Key Deliverable Outcomes (First 6–12 Months)

- Our marketing campaigns are deployed accurately and on schedule.

- Our lead flow through the CRM is seamless and measurable.

- Our sales pipeline automation reduces manual work and increases follow-up consistency.

- Our nurture sequences are functioning and improving conversion rates.

- Our CRM data is clean, organized, and actionable.



Our Ideal Candidate Has These Attributes:

- Systems thinker and problem solver

- Detail-oriented and execution-focused

- Highly organized and deadline-driven

- Data-aware and results-oriented

- Collaborative and proactive communicator

title: AWS Engineer
description:

Bonus Skills (Nice to Have):

GitLab CI).

title: Executive admin assistant
description:
WE’RE HIRING: Student Success Manager / WhatsApp Operations VA (Philippines — Long-Term)

Remote | UK Education (GCSE & A-Level) | Immediate Start



We’re a premium UK tutoring company (20+ years in education) scaling rapidly. Our operations run primarily through WhatsApp and we need a high-calibre Virtual Assistant / Student Success Manager to manage daily communications, onboarding, and tutor–student coordination — with a clear growth path into Setter ? Closer (high-ticket sales).



Role Summary



You will be the front-line operations backbone of the business:

• monitoring WhatsApp continuously during shift hours

• onboarding new students smoothly

• creating WhatsApp groups + sending structured messages

• matching students to tutors and ensuring lessons run without disruption

• communicating professionally with parents about day-to-day learning, homework, and lesson logistics



This role is ideal for someone who is organised, calm under pressure, confident communicating with parents, and willing to learn our systems quickly.



Core Responsibilities

1) WhatsApp Monitoring & Student Onboarding (Daily)



Monitor multiple WhatsApp inboxes during your shift (fast response times expected)



Save new leads/students as contacts correctly (naming conventions provided)



Create WhatsApp groups for new students (e.g., Student + Parent + Tutor + Admin)



Send structured onboarding messages (templates provided)



Follow up systematically (no missed conversations)



Track inflow of students/leads and ensure every enquiry progresses to the next step



2) Tutor–Student Matching & Lesson Coordination (Daily)



Pair students with the right tutor (based on subject, year group, exam board, availability)



Ensure everyone has the correct Zoom/lesson link and lesson timings



Confirm attendance and handle reschedules smoothly



Keep a daily log of lessons booked, completed, missed, and rescheduled



Escalate urgent issues to the director/operations lead quickly and clearly



3) Parent Communication & Student Success Support



Communicate with parents professionally about:



homework submission



missed lessons



exam timelines



progress updates (based on tutor feedback)



Remind students to complete homework / assessments



Occasionally join/check Zoom sessions briefly (when required) to ensure students are engaged and following the process



Support quality assurance standards (consistent messaging, accurate info, calm tone)



4) Optional Growth Duties (As You Prove Yourself)



Appointment setting (booking parent calls)



Sales support (follow-up sequences, warm leads)



Setter role ? Closer role (high-ticket sales) with performance-based earning potential



Light admin support on Zoom logins / scheduling systems (introduced later)



Required Skills & Experience (Non-Negotiable)



Excellent English communication (written + spoken)



Clear, neutral/British-sounding spoken English (parents must find your speech easy to understand)



Confident speaking to UK parents (polite, calm, professional)



Strong organisation: ability to track multiple students/tutors without errors



Comfortable working in a fast-moving WhatsApp-based operations environment



Familiarity with UK education is a major advantage:



GCSE / IGCSE / A-Level awareness (exam boards, grade goals, terminology)



Willingness to learn systems and follow structured processes



Tech Setup Required



Desktop/laptop with WhatsApp Web/Desktop running during shift



Smartphone with WhatsApp installed (for mobility/backup monitoring)



Stable high-speed internet + quiet, professional workspace



Strong typing speed + ability to manage multiple chats efficiently



Basic familiarity with Google Sheets/Docs for logging and tracking



Working Hours



UK business-hours coverage preferred (approx. 9am–5pm UK time), 8-hour shifts



Additional light monitoring may be required occasionally (to be agreed in advance)



Compensation & Growth Path



Fixed salary initially (based on experience and performance in trial period)



Clear progression route:



Student Success Manager / Ops VA



Setter (appointment booking + lead handling)



Closer (high-ticket enrolments) ? higher earning potential



The more responsibility you can handle reliably, the faster your pay and role can grow



What “Good” Looks Like in This Role



No missed leads, no missed follow-ups



Groups set up correctly, messages sent cleanly, parents feel supported



Tutor–student pairing is smooth and errors are rare



You sound confident, warm, professional — parents trust you



You protect the learning experience through consistent communication and structure



How to Apply (MANDATORY)



To be considered, you must send:



CV/Resume (not necessary)



A YouTube video link (not a file upload) — 2 to 4 minutes, unlisted is fine (MUST)

or another suitable link.



Your YouTube video must cover:



Who you are and your relevant experience (especially education/parent-facing work)



Why you’re a strong fit for a premium tutoring company



A short roleplay: how you would speak to a parent about homework not being submitted



Your availability and tech setup (desktop + phone WhatsApp)



Applications without a YouTube link will be rejected.



Important



DO NOT CALL — applications via message only



This role requires professionalism, speed, and reliability



If you’re organised, presentable, parent-friendly, and serious about building a long-term career in education operations — apply now.

description:
I’m looking for a skilled video editor to help edit educational YouTube videos.



This is part-time but consistent work, 1–2 long-form videos per month to start, with potential for more if it’s a good fit.



About the videos

The videos are educational, but they need to feel engaging, modern, and well-paced rather than slow or corporate.



I’m looking for someone who can make videos feel:



clear

dynamic

visually engaging

polished and professional



This role is for someone who can follow direction well and also bring strong editing instincts to the table.



Requirements:

At least 4 years of video editing experience

Must use Adobe Premiere Pro

Do not apply if you use CapCut or any software other than Premiere Pro

Must own a reliable computer

Must speak conversational English

Must be able to follow instructions closely

Must be able to meet deadlines consistently

Must have experience editing for YouTube





Hiring process:

Phase 1:  Message me your CV and a short cover letter. Please start your application with the words: Premiere Pro editor



Phase 2: Only candidates who seem like a strong fit will be invited to complete a short editing test using around 1 minute of footage.



Pay:

$75–$150 USD per long-form video, depending on complexity, quality, and turnaround time. Most videos will be paid within this range, with final pay depending on the scope of the edit.

title: Wholesale Sourcing VA full time
description:
Hiring Amazon Wholesale / Brand Sourcing VA to help me open brand and authorized distributor accounts, request catalogs and price lists, complete wholesale applications, and build a consistent pipeline of profitable wholesale leads for Amazon FBA. You must have real wholesale and brand-sourcing experience and be confident working inside Seller Central to check restrictions, pricing, fees, and eligibility. You should also be skilled with Keepa, RevSeller, and AZInsight to analyze demand, competition, sales rank trends, and true net profit after all costs. Your responsibilities will include tracking outreach, responses, pricing, and lead status in a spreadsheet, following up professionally with suppliers, and submitting only leads that meet my profitability requirements with accurate calculations.



Important: If you do not have at least 2 years of Amazon wholesale or brand-sourcing experience, please do not message or apply. I will not respond to applicants without relevant experience.

title: Project-Based GoHighLevel CRM & Automation Specialist
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines)

Job Type: Part-time, project-based

Compensation: Based on skill and experience; starting range can be discussed, with an initial approved hour cap



About the role



I am looking for an experienced GoHighLevel CRM & Automation Specialist to help set up the backend system for my real estate business.



This is not a full-time marketing manager role. I am not looking for someone to run all of my marketing strategy, social media, or branding.



I need someone who can build a clean and effective GoHighLevel system so my leads are captured, tracked, followed up with, nurtured, and moved toward appointments.



I do not have the time to learn and build the system myself, so I need someone who already understands GoHighLevel and can set it up properly.



What I need



I need help setting up the core GoHighLevel system for:



CRM/contact organization

lead pipeline stages

forms

calendars

workflow automations

/SMS follow-up

lead tracking

simple reporting

documentation

Main responsibilities

Set up GoHighLevel core account structure

Organize contacts, tags, and segmentation

Build one main lead pipeline

Set up one or more lead capture forms

Set up one appointment booking calendar

Create workflow automations for lead follow-up

Set up basic
 and/or SMS sequences

Connect forms, pipeline, and calendar where appropriate

Test the system to make sure it works properly

Document the setup so it is easy to use afterward

Initial scope of work



The first phase of this project should include:



CRM and contact organization

Create a clean structure for contacts

Set up tags and basic segmentation

Lead pipeline



Build one main pipeline with stages such as:



New lead

Contacted

Qualified

Appointment set

Nurture

Active client

Closed

Lost

Lead capture

Build at least one lead capture form

Make sure submissions flow correctly into GoHighLevel

Calendar

Set up one consultation booking calendar

Connect it to the rest of the system as needed

Automations



Set up core workflows such as:



immediate lead response

follow-up after form submission

appointment reminders

simple nurture sequence

Documentation

Provide simple SOP notes or documentation explaining how the system works

What I am looking for



I want someone who is a hands-on builder, not someone who only speaks in general marketing terms.



You should be able to:



think through a clean system

build it correctly

explain your work clearly

work independently

communicate well

stay within scope

Required skills

Strong hands-on experience with GoHighLevel

Experience setting up:

CRM/contact systems

pipelines/opportunities

workflows/automations

calendars

forms/surveys

 and SMS sequences

tags and segmentation

Good English comprehension

Good communication

Strong organization

Ability to work asynchronously and independently

Nice to have

Experience with real estate businesses

Experience with lead-generation systems

Experience documenting SOPs or training tea
mbers

Experience with appointment booking workflows

This role is NOT for



Please do not apply if you are mainly:



a general social media manager

a broad marketing manager

a content creator without strong GoHighLevel setup skills

someone who is brand new to GoHighLevel



This role is specifically for someone who can set up the system correctly.



Work style



This is a remote role with a time-zone difference, so I need someone who is comfortable working asynchronously.



That means you should be able to:



work independently

communicate progress clearly

follow instructions

ask smart questions when needed

stay organized without constant live supervision

Project terms



This is a project-based setup role, not a permanent full-time role.



The project will begin with:



a short review of my needs

your recommended setup plan

an estimated number of hours

an initial approved hour cap



Additional hours must be approved before continuing.



There may be future as-needed work after the initial setup is complete, but this role is primarily for setup and documentation.



To apply, send:

A short introduction

Your GoHighLevel experience

Examples of GoHighLevel systems you have built

What parts of GoHighLevel you are strongest in

Whether you have built pipelines, forms, calendars, workflows, and automations

Whether you have worked with real estate or lead-generation businesses

Your hourly rate

Your estimated hours for a basic setup like this



Put the word "Pipeline" in your subject line so I know you read the full post

Screening question



Please answer this in your application:



If you were setting up GoHighLevel for a real estate business from scratch, what are the first 5 things you would build, and why?

title: URGENT! We're Hiring: Media Buyer (min 3-5 years exp)
description:
Hey there ????



We're Redfern Media (
) and Fractional CMO (
) — a direct response digital marketing agency that's been helping businesses grow for almost two decades. We've been featured in Forbes, Inc., Time, The New York Times, The Washington Post, CNN, Good Morning America, and more, and we've worked with clients like Daymond John (Shark Tank), Dr. Benjamin Hardy, and Alex Epstein.



We're not a media buying agency — we're a full-service direct response shop. Our clients come to us for the whole picture: website development, branding and design, paid ads, SEO,
 automation, calendar automation, Google My Business, voi
 automation, and marketing consultation. On top of that, we run coaching, consultation, and membership programs through Fractional CMO that teach business owners how to build their own marketing engines.

Paid ads are a core part of what we deliver — and that's where you come in.



Who we're looking for

We're adding a full-time Media Buyer to our team to own paid ad campaigns across Meta, Google, LinkedIn, and TikTok for our clients. You'll work alongside our account managers, designers, copywriters, developers, and strategists to build campaigns that actually move the needle — not just rack up impressions.

Because we're a direct response agency, every campaign you run is measured by one thing: did it generate leads, sales, or revenue? If you geek out over CPL, ROAS, and conversion rates more than vanity metrics, you'll fit right in here.



We love AI — and we want you to, too ????

This is important: we're an AI-forward team. We expect everyone on our team to use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and the like) to work smarter, faster, and better every single day. Whether it's speeding up research, drafting ad copy, analyzing performance data, building reports, auditing accounts, or brainstorming creative angles — if AI can help you do it better, we want you using it.



If you're someone who's still resistant to AI, this probably isn't the right fit. But if you've already built AI into your workflow and you're constantly looking for new ways to leverage it, you're going to love it here.

What you'll actually do



Research and strategy (before anything launches)

Research the client's market, audience, and competitors before drafting any campaign

Use AI tools to accelerate market research, audience analysis, and competitive intelligence

Study what's working in the niche using Meta Ad Library, Google Ads Transparency Center, TikTok Creative Center, and similar tools

Build creative swipe files and identify winning hooks, angles, and formats

Write clear strategic briefs that explain why we're running a campaign a certain way

Analyze the client's offer, funnel, and landing pages before recommending an ad spend



Auditing (a major part of the role)

Audit new client ad accounts top to bottom — structure, spend efficiency, wasted budget, naming conventions, and account health

Audit tracking setups: pixels, Conversions API, GTM, UTMs, custom conversions, and attribution

Audit performance data to find what's working, what's broken, and what to fix first

Audit landing pages and funnels for conversion friction

Flag compliance issues, especially in regulated niches like financial services and health



Campaign execution

Build and launch campaigns on Meta, Google, LinkedIn, and TikTok

Install and troubleshoot Meta Pixel, Google Tag, LinkedIn Insight Tag, and Conversions API

Set up Business Managers, ad accounts, and resolve restrictions when they pop up

Build lead forms and connect them to client CRMs (GoHighLevel, Google Sheets, etc.)

Write ad copy and creative briefs for our designers and video editors (AI-assisted is encouraged)



Optimization and scaling

Monitor campaigns daily, pause underperformers, and scale winners

Run A/B tests on creatives, audiences, and offers

Diagnose underperformance and actually fix it (not just report it)

Manage budget pacing across multiple accounts



Reporting and communication

Pull weekly performance reports and build client dashboards (we use Agency Analytics)

Translate data into plain-English insights clients and account managers can actually use

Coordinate daily with our team via Basecamp — clear writing matters here

Occasionally support our Fractional CMO coaching members with paid ad questions



What we're looking for

Minimum 3-5 years of hands-on media buying experience

Hands-on experience running Meta Ads is a must

Experience with at least one of: Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, or TikTok Ads (bonus if all three)

You actively use AI tools in your daily workflow and are excited to push that further

Comfortable with pixel installation, GTM, and tracking troubleshooting

You can audit an ad account and tell us what's wrong with it in 30 minutes

You actually enjoy research — competitor analysis, creative research, audience digging

Strong direct response instincts (you understand the difference between branding and direct response)

Strong writing skills — you'll write briefs, ad copy, and a lot of Basecamp comments

You can juggle multiple client accounts without dropping balls

You take ownership and don't wait to be told what to do next

Available to work USA Central Time (CT) hours



Nice to have (but not required — we can teach this)

Previous experience working at a digital marketing agency (huge plus)

Experience in regulated niches like financial services, fertility/health, or coaching

Conversions API and server-side tracking setup

Familiarity with GoHighLevel, Agency Analytics, or similar tools

Experience writing UGC scripts or directing video ads

Background working with personal brands, authors, speakers, or course creators



Why join us

Almost two decades in the game — you'll learn from a team that's seen what works (and what doesn't) across hundreds of clients

AI-forward culture — you'll be encouraged (and expected) to use AI to make your work better and faster every day

Diverse client roster — financial advisors, fertility doctors, bestselling authors, coaches, and more, so you won't get bored

You're part of a real team, not a solo media buyer drowning alone — designers, copywriters, developers, and account managers have your back

Direct response focus means your work has clear, measurable impact — when campaigns win, everyone sees it

Featured in major media (Forbes, Inc., Time, NYT, CNN, GMA) — you'll be working on campaigns with real visibility

Full-time role with a team that genuinely values growth and ownership



Don't worry if you don't check every box. If you've got 5+ years of solid Meta Ads experience, you're already using AI to level up your work, and you have a genuine curiosity for the strategy, auditing, and direct response side of things — we want to hear from you.



How to apply

Head over to 
/careers and submit:

title: URGENT HIRING: Quality Analyst (Full Time, Remote)
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented Quality Analyst to join our QA Department and ensure the accuracy and compliance of medical-legal reports for a California-based company. The QA will be responsible for delivering high-quality, error-free final documents. Candidates from top universities in the Philippines are strongly encouraged to apply.



Location: Remote

Schedule: Full-Time, Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM, Pacific Time



Responsibilities:

- Transcribe physician dictations into structured, accurate QME reports.

- Perform thorough quality checks on grammar, formatting, and case details.

- Perform final quality checks for all documents before send-out.

- Cross-reference reports with pre-packet documents to ensure consistency.

- Ensure final reports meet DWC/QME formatting and compliance standards.

- Coordinate with other QA staff, back office, and physicians as needed.



Qualifications:

- Excellent written English and strong attention to detail.

- Experience in transcription or quality assurance preferred.

- Familiarity with medical/legal terminology is an advantage.

- Ability to work independently with high accuracy.

- Fast learner, comfortable with structured templates.

- Strong analytical and critical thinking skills.

- Team-oriented and accountable.



Application Requirements (Incomplete submissions will not be considered):

- Google Drive link to updated resume/CV and DIPLOMA (set to “Anyone with the link can view”).

- Vocaroo link with a brief self-introduction (name, background, and reason for interest in the role).

Note: Applications missing any of the above requirements will not be considered.

title: Virtual Assistant — Operations & Growth
description:
VIRTUAL ASSISTANT — OPERATIONS & GROWTH

Gold Coast Pool Inspections | Starts part-time, path to full-time | Remote | Australian business



ABOUT THE ROLE

We're a professional pool safety inspection business on the Gold Coast, Australia. We help homeowners, real estate agents, and property managers navigate pool compliance — clearly, efficiently, and without the confusion.



We're growing fast and need someone exceptional to help run the day-to-day operations behind the scenes. That's the core of this role. But we're also looking for someone who — if they have the interest and the skills — can help us grow through lead generation, outreach, and social media. The more the business grows, the faster this role becomes full-time.



This is not a role where you sit and wait to be told what to do. We want someone who sees what needs doing, does it, and finds better ways to get it done.



---



THE CORE JOB — OPERATIONS & ADMIN

This is your primary responsibility. Everything else is secondary to getting this right.



- Manage and schedule inspection jobs using our booking software (Formitize)

- Handle client
s — professionally, clearly, and on time

- Track job blockers and follow up with clients until resolved

- Organise documents in Google Drive with accuracy and consistency

- Process compliance certificates and coordinate with the QBCC pool register

- Support outreach to real estate agents and property managers

- Flag anything unusual and suggest improvements to how we operate

- Help build and maintain simple SOPs so nothing depends on memory



---



GROWTH OPPORTUNITY — IF YOU LOVE MARKETING, THERE'S MORE HERE FOR YOU



Once you're across the operations side, there's a real opportunity to take on a second lane: helping us grow the business through sales and marketing. This is optional, not required — but if this is your thing, we want to hear about it.



This is where someone with the right skills could genuinely accelerate their path to a full-time role.



- Lead generation and agent outreach (SMS,
, LinkedIn)

- Social media content — Instagram,
, Google Business

- Simple graphics and visual creatives (Canva or similar)

- Follow-up sequences for warm leads and past clients

- Expiry reminder campaigns to our existing client database

- Helping shape how we present the business online



You won't be thrown into this on day one. Operations first, always. But if you're ambitious and want to do more — the door is open.



---



THE GROWTH PATH

Months 1–2: Learn ops & systems

Months 2–4: Own your lane, add marketing (if of interest)

6+ months: Full-time operator & growth role



The timeline is driven by you. The faster you prove reliability, initiative, and results — the faster the role expands.



---



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Essential (everyone):

- Outstanding attention to detail

- Strong written English

- Self-driven — no micromanaging needed

- Comfortable with systems and SOPs

- Reliable and consistent

- Google Workspace proficient

- Calm under pressure



Bonus — marketing track:

- Canva or graphic design tools

- Social media content creation

-
 or SMS outreach experience

- Lead generation experience

- Instagram /
 / Google

- Copywriting or campaign ideas



---



WHO THRIVES HERE

The right person for this role takes pride in doing things properly. They don't just complete a task — they notice when something could be done better and they say so. They follow instructions precisely when learning, then bring their own thinking once they understand the system. They are the kind of person who builds a reputation for being the most reliable person on the team — and then quietly starts doing more than anyone asked.



---



HOW TO APPLY

Send a short message introducing yourself. Tell us:



1. Your relevant experience in admin or operations (briefly)

2. One example of when you caught a mistake or improved a process at work

3. If you have any marketing or creative experience — tell us what you've done

4. Your availability and your expected hourly rate



Applications without all four points will not be considered. We are looking for someone who reads instructions carefully — this is your first test.

title: Real Estate Cold Caller & Appointment Setter
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing real estate team based in Hawaii, helping buyers, sellers, and investors with residential real estate. We are looking for a motivated and experienced cold caller to join our team and help follow up with leads and prospect for new opportunities.



Position Overview

We are hiring a remote cold caller from the Philippines to call existing leads and prospect for new homeowners using our dialer system (Mojo Dialer) and Follow up boss. This role requires someone confident on the phone, consistent, and resilient—someone who does not get discouraged by rejection and stays positive and professional in every call.

This will begin as a part-time role, with the opportunity to transition into a full-time position based on performance and results.



Responsibilities

Call and follow up with existing real estate leads from our CRM

Prospect homeowners in targeted neighborhoods using Mojo Dialer

Build rapport and maintain professional conversations

Identify potential buyers and sellers

Set qualified appointments for the real estate team

Update CRM notes accurately after each call

Provide daily/weekly call reports and feedback

Maintain a positive and energetic attitude on the phone





Requirements





Previous experience as a cold caller or telemarketer (real estate experience preferred)





Strong English communication and accent clarity





Confident speaking with homeowners in the U.S.





Thick skin and resilience — able to handle rejection and negative responses professionally





Self-motivated and goal-oriented





Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment





Experience using dialers like Mojo Dialer, CallTools, or similar (preferred)





CRM experience is a plus





Work Schedule





Start: Part-time (4 hours/day)





Opportunity to move to full-time based on performance





Must be available during U.S. business hours (Hawaii/Pacific Time preferred)





Compensation



Competitive hourly pay (based on experience)



Performance bonuses for appointments set and deals closed

Opportunity for long-term full-time position and growth with the team



What We’re Looking For



We want someone who is:

Motivated and hungry to succeed

Consistent and reliable

Not easily discouraged by rejection

Positive, coachable, and team-oriented

Looking for a long-term role with growth potential

title: Video Editor
description:
Video Editor (Remote – Philippines)

U.S.-Based Outdoor Gear Brand

We’re a fast-growing outdoor gear company creating products for people who feel more at home in the mountains, on the water, and off the grid than they do indoors. From backcountry hunts to cold mornings at camp, our brand lives in real-world adventure — and we’re looking for a Video Editor who can bring those stories to life.

This role is ideal for someone who loves pacing, emotion, and visual storytelling just as much as clean cuts and color.



About the Role

You’ll be a key part of our creative team, turning raw field footage into compelling stories that move people — whether that’s a product launch film, a social reel, or a YouTube mini-doc. You’ll collaborate daily with our U.S.-based creative leads and marketing team while working remotely from the Philippines.

We move fast, care about craft, and believe great editing is invisible — until it hits you in the chest.



What You’ll Do

• Edit high-quality video content for:

Social media (short-form, vertical, performance-driven)

YouTube and brand storytelling films

Product launches and campaigns

Paid ads and performance marketing

• Shape story from raw footage, not just assemble cuts

• Select music, build pacing, and enhance emotional tone

• Perform color correction and basic color grading

• Clean up and mix dialogue, natural sound, and music

• Add motion graphics, titles, and simple visual effects when needed

• Organize and manage media, project files, and exports

• Create multiple cutdowns and format variations for different platforms

• Collaborate across time zones with U.S. creative leadership

• Take feedback well and iterate quickly



What We’re Looking For

Must-Haves

3+ years professional video editing experience

Strong portfolio showing storytelling ability (not just flashy cuts)

Must be able to work U.S. Mountain Time hours primarily (9:00am to 5:00pm Mountain Time) with flexible schedule opportunities after training period

Advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro

Working knowledge of After EffectsSolid understanding of pacing, rhythm, and emotional storytellingExperience editing outdoor, lifestyle, documentary, or product contentStrong English communication skills (written and spoken)Ability to work independently and hit deadlines without hand-holdingReliable high-speed internet and professional remote setupBig Pluses

Experience with outdoor, hunting, camping, or adventure brandsColor grading experience (Lumetri or DaVinci a bonus)Sound design skillsUnderstanding of social media performance editing (hooks, retention, etc.)Experience working with U.S.-based teams



You’re a Great Fit If You…

Can turn messy field footage into a clear, emotional storyKnow when to let a shot breathe — and when to cut fastCare about tiny details most people never noticeUnderstand that editing is storytelling, not just softwareTake direction well but also bring your own creative instinctsLove the outdoors (even if you’re editing it from your desk)



What You’ll Get

Long-term remote role with a growing U.S. outdoor brandConsistent, ongoing project workCreative team that values craft and storytellingOpportunity to work on meaningful, real-world adventure content



How to Apply

Please submit:

Your portfolio (REQUIRED — applications without samples will not be considered)A short note about your editing style and experienceYour software proficiency and internet speedYour availability (hours per week)

Must apply with 8 apply points

Must submit a resume



If you know how to make someone feel the cold morning air, the weight of a pack, or the quiet before sunrise — we want to see your work.

title: Branding and website designer
description:
Hello,



We are currently looking for an experienced designer with a strong marketing sense for user experience (UX/UI) and branding ideas to assist us with customer projects. 



This offer is for regular contract-based work but it may become a full-time position in the near future. We will pay per contract or per hour depending on the task. 



We can pay between 10$ - 20$ / hour USD - it depends on your skill level and your time evaluations for projects.



I am Andréanne, the co-founder of a dynamic web marketing and programming agency called Bridge Media, working with small to medium-sized businesses. We are located in the city of Montréal, in Québec, Canada. We are an experienced, collaborative, and fun team of 15 talented people with various expertise who are passionate about the success of our clients. 



Here is what you would be doing : 



- Logo design

- Landing page / website design

- Graphic charters / brand guidelines

- Branding documents and print materials



Requirements: 



- Great experience using Figma or Adobe XD

- Great experience in logo, website (desktop and mobile) and branding design 

- Strong marketing sense (UX/UI)

- Highly creative and high-end designs

- Detail-oriented and good visual eye

- Reliability - we need to be sure we can execute projects on time to our customers

- Availability - from 8 pm to 12 am in your time zone so we can reach you 



An asset, bu not required :



- Experience in mobile app design 





If you think that you have the correct skills and experience, please write to me and answer these 4 questions:



1. In the section above about the requirements, can you give details about each requirement (your skill, how many years of experience, your ideas or thoughts)



2. How many hours per month do you have to work with us?



3. Please provide your expected hourly rate. 



4. Please provide a portfolio of website designs, logo designs and graphic charters





What you can expect from us when you apply:

- If we believe there could be a fit between us, we will schedule a Google Meet call in the next few days. 

- We will start with one small project that will not be paid. If it goes well, we will try you out for 1 month with paid projects. If it goes well, it can become a full-time position with us.





Looking forward to meeting you and learning what projects you have completed so far!



--

Andréanne Lafleur

Cofounder of Bridge Media
