title: YouTube Video Editor (History Docuseries | AI Driven Content Studio)
description:
My name is Reece, and we’re expanding our network of YouTube channels across history-focused niches, using storytelling and long-form videos.



We’re building a portfolio of high-performing YouTube channels designed to reach millions of viewers globally, and we’re looking for a Video Editor who understands storytelling, pacing, and retention (not just cutting clips)



You’ll take a leading role in launching a brand-new AI-powered history docuseries channel.



This isn’t a one-off project... there’s long-term upside as we expand into more channels.



We’re combining:



- AI-generated videos using Veo 3, Kling or traditional YouTube automation B Rolls

- Sound design

- Engaging clips

- AI-generated imagery

- Clear, compelling voiceovers



The Opportunity:



This is not a typical editing role. You’ll be responsible for turning ideas into videos that people actually watch to the end.



You’ll work on content designed to:

- Hit 100K-1M+ views

- Keep viewers engaged for long durations

- Compete with fast-growing history channels



You won’t just edit... You’ll help shape:

- Pacing, structure, and storytelling

- The overall style we’re building toward



Here are a few examples of the style we’ll be emulating:

- 

- 

- 
 (B Roll example)



Work Process:



I will provide a topic and short outline. From there, you will:

- Use our custom GPT to generate a polished script

- Create a voice-over using ElevenLabs

- Source relevant clips (films, interviews, public footage)

- Combine clips and AI visuals into an engaging final video

- Maintain strong pacing and storytelling throughout



Upsides:



- You’ll learn how to create content that actually performs on YouTube

- Long-term role as we scale multiple channels

- Clear systems (no guessing what to do)

- All tools and software licenses are provided (editing tools, AI tools, voiceover tools, etc.)

- Performance bonuses as channels grow

- Opportunity to grow into a Lead Editor role



Position Details:

- Full-time: 40 hours per week (Monday to Saturday)

- Expected Output: 1–2 videos per day (40 mins per video)

- Monthly Salary: $400–$500 USD + incentive bonuses

- Regular performance-based pay reviews

- Long-term role with growth potential



Ideal Candidate Has:



- Passion for YouTube and storytelling

- Experience editing clip-based or commentary-style videos

- Good sense of pacing and retention

- Strong communication and reliability

- Ability to follow structure and deliver consistently



How to Apply:



- Start your message with your favourite animal

- Send 2–3 examples of your best work (similar style preferred)

- Tell us which of the example channels you like most (and why)

title: React Native Expo developer (AI Native/Claude Code)
description:
Mobile App React Native Developer



Leverage AI-powered development tools daily — including Claude Code, Cursor, and similar assistants — to ship faster, write better code, and stay at the cutting edge of AI-native engineering



Company Description



AI Studio 10 is a product-focused company committed to building AI-powered consumer applications that address real human needs. Our team is dedicated to developing and launching innovative apps that are simple, elegant, and impactful, with a global reach. We embrace a fast-paced, iterative approach and prioritize product-market fit in all we create. At AI Studio 10, we value elite talent, creative autonomy, and fostering a sense of ownership among team members. Join a passionate team striving to craft meaningful, profitable applications that bring clarity, connection, and energy to users worldwide.



Role Description



We're looking for a versatile and experienced React Native Frontend Developer to join our passionate, fast-moving team. If you're excited by the idea of building mobile apps that are not just smart but soulfully designed, we want to hear from you.



What you'll do:



Build and maintain cross-platform mobile apps using React Native and Expo

Write clean, scalable, and maintainable code with attention to performance

Work with the Expo toolkit (CLI, Go, EAS Build/Submit) to streamline development and delivery

Collaborate closely with designers and backend developers to build seamless user experiences

Integrate with RESTful APIs and backend services

Use modern state management tools like Redux, Zustand, or Context API

Build responsive UI components with care for animations and accessibility

Identify and resolve bugs across platforms and devices

Stay current with React Native, mobile UI/UX trends, and AI product design

Contribute to product development through collaboration and experimentation

Qualifications



3+ years of professional experience with React Native

Solid experience with the Expo ecosystem and its tools

Strong knowledge of JavaScript (ES6+) and TypeScript

Experience with state management libraries (Redux, Zustand, etc.)

Comfortable working with REST APIs and modern development tools (Git, npm/yarn)

Interest in AI-assisted development — experience with AI coding tools (Cursor, GitHub Copilot, or similar) is a plus

Enthusiasm for building intuitive and well-designed mobile apps

Strong problem-solving skills and debugging abilities

Good communication and collaboration skills in a remote-first environment

A portfolio showcasing React Native work (especially with Expo) is highly valued

What we offer:



Full-time remote position with flexible schedule

Work on meaningful AI-powered products that serve real human needs

Culture of wellness, clarity, and purpose — we move fast, but with intention

A small, values-driven team where your contributions matter

The opportunity to build mindful, intelligent tech with lasting impact

Excellent verbal and written communication skills

Experience with CRM systems and booking software is a plus

Self-motivated with a results-driven attitude



Compensation & Benefits:



Competitive base pay

Commission opportunities available after 60 days

Performance-based raises available after 60 days

Opportunity for growth within a rapidly expanding company

title: Video editing direct response marketing meta ads
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Video Editor specialized in Performance Marketing for Meta 
 & Instagram) Ads to join our team on a long-term basis.



What we are looking for:

• Strong mastery of performance-driven cutting styles (fast-paced, hook-based, UGC, direct response, scroll-stopping edits).

• Excellent English language skills (spoken and written).

• Ability to work confidently with AI translation tools.

• Capability to create videos in both English and German.

• Experience in selecting and cutting the right scenes according to a given script.

• Ability to generate high-quality voice-overs in English and German using ElevenLabs or similar AI voice tools.

• Strong sense for timing, storytelling, and ad psychology.

• High attention to quality and detail.



Work Structure:

We are looking for a reliable, long-term creative partner who takes quality seriously and understands performance marketing at a high level.

title: Full-Time Cold Caller / Appointment Setter — AI Receptionist Company
description:
We're hiring a full-time cold caller / appointment setter for Alyro AI, an AI receptionist company serving US home service businesses.

What you'll do:



High-volume cold calling to US business owners daily

Use the provided opener and talking points to guide natural conversations — no rigid script reading

Handle objections conversationally and build rapport with business owners

Log every call outcome in a shared spreadsheet

Book interested leads for discovery calls on the owner's calendar

Provide interested prospects with a demo phone number



Requirements:



Previous cold calling or sales experience required — must be comfortable having real conversations, not just reading a script

Clear, natural-sounding English (neutral or American accent preferred)

Quiet workspace with reliable internet

Must have a US phone number or VOIP service (e.g., OpenPhone, Google Voice) that displays a US caller ID. We can provide one if needed.

Available Monday-Friday, 6:00 AM – 2:00 PM US Central Time (11:00 AM – 7:00 PM UTC / 7:00 PM – 3:00 AM PHT)

Comfortable with high rejection — most calls won't answer or will say no

Reliable and consistent — show up every day, no excuses



Schedule: Monday – Friday, 6:00 AM – 2:00 PM US Central Time (11:00 AM – 7:00 PM UTC / 7:00 PM – 3:00 AM PHT). Full-time, 40 hours/week.

Pay: $4-5/hour USD ($640-800/month)

Trial period: 1-week paid trial to ensure fit before committing to ongoing role

What we provide:



Complete cold calling script with openers, objection handling, and voi
 scripts

Fresh lead lists weekly (you never need to find your own leads)

Full training on the process and tools

Simple tracking system

US VOIP number provided if you don't have one



About us: Alyro AI builds AI receptionists that answer phone calls 24/7 for home service businesses. The AI qualifies leads and books appointments automatically. Your job is to get business owners on the phone and book them for a demo — the product sells itself.

title: Client Success Manager (Giving Feedback) – $1,100/month
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term Role



Start at $935 per month base.

With bonuses, most earn around $1,100 per month.

Top performers grow to $1,800–$2,500 within 6–12 months.



Paid every two weeks via Wise. Always on time.



This is not a short-term job.

We build long-term careers.



You’ll have clear systems, call scripts, training, and daily team support.

You won’t be guessing what to do.



About Us



Young Publisher - 



We are an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.

We have hired Filipino professionals for over 5 years.

We focus on stability, structure, and growth.



What You’ll Gain



- Full-time stable income

- Monday to Friday schedule

- Flexible hours (one daily meeting required)

- No graveyard shifts

- Reliable payments via Wise every two weeks.

- Performance bonuses

- Clear path to increase your income

- All tools provided

- If you perform well, your income grows.



What You’ll Do



- Manage 40–50 clients

- Run onboarding calls (script provided)

- Review client content and give clear feedback

- Reply to messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 sessions

- Track client progress and update reports

- Join daily team check-ins

- Your role is to help clients succeed and stay long-term.



What We’re Looking For



- Strong English (written and spoken)

- Confident on Zoom calls

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet

- Quiet workspace

- Consistent and accountable



Bonus if you have experience with short-form content, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or AI tools like ChatGPT and CapCut.



How to Apply



Send a message with “CSM” as the subject line.



Include ONLY:



#1: Your CV

#2: Years of short-form content experience

#3: Years of client management experience

#4: One sentence explaining why you are a strong fit

#5: Your portfolio



Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Turo Fleet Virtual Assistant – Customer Service & Operations
description:
We are Social Drive LLC, a professional Turo car-sharing fleet based in Austin, Texas with 66 vehicles actively rented through the Turo platform. We are hiring TWO reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistants to cover our daily operations.



SHIFT OPTIONS (CST – Central Standard Time):

- Morning Shift: 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM CST (Monday, Wednesday–Sunday | Tuesday off)

- Evening Shift: 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM CST (Monday–Tuesday, Thursday–Sunday | Wednesday off)



Please indicate in your application which shift you are available for.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Respond to guest messages on Turo promptly and professionally

- Handle trip modification requests, extensions, and cancellations

- Escalate urgent issues to the owner via

WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:

- Reliable internet connection and dedicated workspace

- Familiarity with Google Sheets/Excel,
, and iCloud messaging

- Able to start within 2 weeks



HIRING PROCESS:

To apply: Send your resume, your preferred shift, and a brief note about any Turo or car rental experience you have.

title: Full-Stack & AI Engineer
description:
About Us



We’re building an AI-powered platform that helps government contractors turn complex solicitations (RFPs, RFQs, SOWs) into submission-ready, compliance-driven proposals in minutes—not weeks.



This is not a generic AI tool. We are building a document intelligence and workflow system that combines:



• AI-driven proposal generation

• Compliance automation

• Structured data extraction from real-world documents



Our goal is simple: help us win more government contracts with less effort.

 

The Role



We’re looking for a Full-Stack & AI Engineer to own the core product build—from UI to backend to AI pipelines.



You’ll work directly with the founder to turn real-world workflows into a production-ready platform.



This is a high-ownership role. You won’t just write code—you’ll help define the product.

 

What You’ll Build



Product Systems



• Web application (dashboard, proposal builder, compliance matrix)

• Document upload and processing pipelines

• Structured data models for RFPs, requirements, and proposals



AI / Intelligence Layer



• RFP parsing and requirement extraction

• Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) using company data

• Proposal section generation (executive summary, technical approach, etc.)

• Compliance mapping (requirements ? proposal sections)

• Prompt optimization and output validation



Platform Infrastructure



• API design and backend services

• Database architecture (PostgreSQL)

• File storage and document handling

• Background job processing (parsing, generation, exports)

 

Tech Stack (Initial)



• Frontend: Next.js, React, Tailwind

• Backend: Python (FastAPI)

• Database: PostgreSQL

• AI: LLM APIs, RAG systems

• Infra: AWS / Vercel / similar

 

What We’re Looking For



Core Requirements



• Years building production SaaS applications

• Strong full-stack experience (frontend + backend)

• Hands-on experience with LLM-based systems (RAG, prompt design, APIs)

• Experience working with unstructured data (documents, PDFs, etc.)

• Ability to design and ship systems end-to-end



Mindset



• Product-oriented (not just task-oriented)

• Comfortable with ambiguity and early-stage execution

• Focused on shipping fast and iterating

• Strong problem-solving and ownership mentality

 

Nice to Have



• Experience with document parsing / OCR pipelines

• Experience with workflow automation tools

 

What Success Looks Like 



• Users can upload an RFP and get structured requirements

• System generates a usable draft proposal

• Compliance matrix accurately maps requirements

• First real users are testing and giving feedback



Why Join



• Build a category-defining product from the ground up

• Direct impact on architecture, product, and direction

• Work on real-world problems with immediate business value

• Fast execution, no bureaucracy



NOTE: Include FSE&AIE2026 in your subject

title: Senior Telesales Manager (Build & Scale Function)
description:
Senior Telesales Manager (Build & Scale Function)

8-Figure D2C Supplement Brand

Remote | $2,000/month + Performance-Based Profit Share



About the Role



We are an established 8-figure D2C supplement brand launching our outbound telesales channel.

We are looking for a hands-on telesales leader who can build this function from scratch — hiring, structuring, training, and scaling a high-performing outbound team.



This is a build-phase leadership role with clear opportunity to grow into Head of Telesales as the team scales.



What You’ll Build

You will:

Hire and train an initial team of 3–5 telesales reps



Design outbound workflows for:

Abandoned cart recovery

Subscription conversion

Subscription reactivation

Cross-sell and upsell campaigns

Develop call scripts and objection frameworks

Implement performance tracking and QA systems

Collaborate with marketing to align messaging

Help select and implement dialer + CRM systems

Ensure ethical and compliant supplement sales practices





What Success Looks Like

First 90 Days:

Team hired and trained

Core workflows implemented

100+ daily calls running

5–8% abandoned cart conversion baseline





Months 4–6:

Scale to 8–10 reps

$50K+ monthly incremental revenue

10–12% abandoned cart conversion

15–20% subscription conversion from contacted one-time buyers





Months 7–12:

Team of 15+ reps with leadership layer

$150K+ monthly incremental revenue

Telesales contributing 10–15% of total company revenue





Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)

5+ years in telesales / outbound sales

2+ years leading a sales team

Experience building or restructuring outbound teams

Experience working with ecommerce or D2C brands

Strong understanding of KPIs (conversion rate, AOV, CAC, LTV)

Experience with CRM and auto-dialer systems

Data-driven and performance-oriented



Preferred:

Subscription business experience

Supplement / health product experience

Familiarity with compliance standards in regulated industries



What We’re Looking For

Builder mindset — comfortable creating systems from zero

Strong coach and performance manager

Ethical sales approach (no misleading health claims)

Results-driven and accountable for revenue targets

Collaborative with marketing and operations



Compensation

$2,000/month base

Performance-based profit share tied to telesales revenue



Fully remote





Why This Role Is Unique

You’re not inheriting a call center.



You’re building a revenue channel from the ground up inside a proven 8-figure brand with strong product-market fit.



If you’ve wanted ownership instead of just managing KPIs someone else built — this is that opportunity.



To apply, please send the following:



Updated Resume



Cover letter answering:

How you would build this from scratch

Conversion rates and revenue results achieved

Your philosophy on ethical selling in supplements



(Optional) Sample script or training document



Subject Line: Head of Telesales – [Your Name] or send your applications directly through this link:

title: Senior Finance & Accounts Manager
description:
We are a well-established New Zealand-based small business seeking an experienced part-time Financial Controller to support daily financial operations, cash management, and budgeting with real experience in small business operations. 

This is a hands-on role requiring strong attention to detail, discipline, and the ability to follow structured financial systems.

Hours are 2–4 hours per day, working New Zealand business hours.

You will be responsible for maintaining accurate, real-time financial visibility across the business, ensuring all transactions are reconciled daily and cash is managed with discipline.

You will work closely with the Managing Director and leadership team to support budgeting, reporting, and financial accuracy.



Key Responsibilities

- Prepare and maintain daily cash report (completed by 9am NZ time)

- Reconcile all transactions in Xero daily, ensuring accounts match bank balances and are correctly coded

- Review and manage accounts payable, including payment preparation

- Draft and maintain budgets with input from leadership

- Review and report on Profit First allocations (training provided)

- Ensure all financial data is accurate, up-to-date, and reliable



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

- CPA qualification (or equivalent)

- Strong, proven experience using Xero

- Experience in daily reconciliations and cash management

- High attention to detail and accuracy

- Strong communication skills – must ask questions if unsure (no guessing)

- Your English needs to be confident enough to hop on a Zoom with Financial Controller in USA or CEO

- Able to work consistently during NZ business hours

- We’d prefer you to have an Apple Mac for data security but will provide a VPN



Important Notes

This role does not include payroll or tax returns

This is a detail-focused, process-driven role, not a strategic finance role

Training will be provided on our internal financial system (Profit First)



Application Instructions (IMPORTANT)

To apply, you must follow these instructions exactly so take your time to do it as instructed:

Use the portal to apply (not an
)

Use the subject line: “Senior Finance & Accounts Manager Application - Why Me”



Include:

1. A short introduction (max 5 sentences) with your why and experience for this role specifically

2. Your experience with Xero (specific examples)

3. Confirmation of your CPA qualification

4. Your availability in NZ hours

5. Summarise what the Profit First System is in two sentences

6. A link to a short video introducing yourself and why you'd love this role

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed. Do not use AI to write your application.



Next Step

Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a (paid) practical task based on real financial data.



Why Join Us

Stable, long-standing international business

Clear systems and processes already in place

Flexible part-time role with consistent hours

Opportunity to work closely with leadership and contribute to business stability

title: Google Ads/Media Buyer
description:
We are an established Australian digital marketing agency looking for a smart, reliable, client-focused Paid Media and Client Success Coordinator based in the Philippines.



This is a junior-to-mid-level role, ideal for someone who enjoys both people and performance marketing.



You do not need to be the final strategist for every account. Our leadership team will handle much of the higher-level strategy. What we need is someone who can help manage campaigns well, communicate confidently with clients, work closely with our team, and embrace modern tools, including AI, to improve speed and quality.



If you love being part of a team, building strong client relationships, learning new platforms, and using technology to work smarter, we would love to hear from you.



About the role



You will help manage paid media accounts, support client communication, and work with our internal team to keep campaigns moving smoothly.



You will also be expected to use modern tools, including AI, as part of your workflow. We are looking for someone who is curious, adaptable, and excited by where digital marketing is heading.



What you will be doing



• Support campaign management across Google Ads, Meta Ads, and other platforms where relevant

• Assist with launches, optimisation, audience targeting, creative testing, reporting, and account QA

• Join client calls and communicate with clients in a clear, friendly, confident way

• Build strong relationships with clients and help them feel supported

• Work with our team to action campaign tasks and keep projects organised

• Use AI tools and workflow tools to improve research, execution, reporting, and delivery

• Help manage AI supported implementation workflows, including tools such as Manus and ChatGPT

• Review tracking, conversion actions, landing pages, and campaign structure for accuracy

• Stay open to learning new platforms, systems, and processes as we grow



Platforms you may work across



• Google Ads

• Meta Ads

• LinkedIn Ads

• TikTok Ads

• YouTube

• Microsoft Ads

• Other paid media platforms as needed



You do not need to be an expert in every platform already, but you must have solid paid media fundamentals and be willing to learn.



What we are looking for



• Excellent written and spoken English

• Strong client communication skills

• Friendly, professional, and confident in meetings

• Organised, detail oriented, and reliable

• Comfortable working as part of a team

• Open to feedback, coaching, and continuous improvement

• Comfortable with AI, automation, and modern technology

• Understanding of paid media fundamentals, including objectives, targeting, budgets, tracking, creative testing, and reporting

• Hands on experience with Google Ads and Meta Ads

• Reliable internet, a quiet workspace, and the ability to attend video meetings



This role is a great fit if you are



• Client focused and genuinely enjoy building relationships

• Curious about new technology and excited to use AI well

• Coachable and happy to grow with a team

• Proactive, calm, and solutions focused

• Interested in long term career growth in digital marketing



This role is not a fit if you



• Resist new technology or refuse to use AI tools

• Dislike speaking with clients

• Need constant direction for every task

• Struggle to adapt when platforms and processes change



Why join us



• Long term opportunity with room to grow

• Supportive team environment

• Clear strategic direction from leadership

• Exposure to multiple paid media platforms

• Opportunity to work closely with clients and make a real impact

• Modern, forward thinking agency environment



How to apply



Please send the following:



• A short introduction about yourself

• Your experience with Google Ads, Meta Ads, and any other paid media platforms

• A brief summary of the types of clients or campaigns you have worked on

• A short voice note or video introduction

• Your expected monthly salary in PHP

• Your available work hours

• The words AI Ready at the top of your application so we know you read the full ad



Please also answer these questions:



What paid media platforms have you worked on directly?

What do you enjoy more, client communication, campaign management, or a mix of both?

How have you used AI or automation tools in your work so far?

Tell us about a time you helped improve a client relationship or solved a campaign issue

What interests you about working with a team like ours?



Do not send a generic application. We are looking for someone thoughtful, switched on, and genuinely excited to grow with us.

title: Welcome to K-POP UNIVERSE: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat!
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree

title: HR operations Assistant
description:
We’re looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented, and reliable Business & HR Operations VA to join our team. This is a part-time remote role (15–20 hours/week) with long-term growth potential.



You’ll work behind the scenes to help run smooth operations, manage business systems, and support our team’s HR and payroll functions.



If you love systems, spreadsheets, Shopify, and supporting women-led businesses — this is for you.



MUST BE AVAILABLE TO WORK DURING US CENTRAL TIME!



???? Responsibilities:



?? Operations & Systems

 • Organize receipts, expenses, and weekly business reports

 • Maintain Google Sheets dashboards for inventory, payroll, and booking logs

 • Assist with scheduling, reminders, and system documentation



????????? Human Resources Support

 • Maintain onboarding docs and HR files

 • Track hours via TimeProof and manage payroll logs

 • Weekly reporting and check-ins on staff updates

 • Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

 • TimeProof (time tracking)

 • Slack or WhatsApp (communication)

 • Trello or Notion (task management)



? You Are:

 • A clear communicator with excellent written English

 • Great with spreadsheets and systems

 • Highly organized and self-motivated

 • Reliable, honest, and solutions-focused



???? Perks:

 • Weekly pay

 • Supportive and flexible work environment

 • Long-term growth potential

 • Bonus opportunities over time

 • Work with a fun, beauty-based, women-led brand



?? How to Apply:



Send your:

 • Resume

 • A short 1–2 minute intro video (introduce yourself + your favorite system or tool)

 • Your desired weekly rate

title: Tech Ops and Automation Manager: $1,500–$2,000 USD PER MONTH
description:
Start rate: $1,500–$2,000 per month (based on experience)

Paid once per month via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.



If you’re someone who wants to take full ownership and build systems that scale, this role is for you!



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours per week (Flexible hours)

- Long-term stability: Not a short-term freelance contract.

- Stable monthly income: On-time payments via Wise

- Growth path: Opportunity to take full ownership of our tech stack

- High impact: Your systems directly affect revenue, retention, and team efficiency

- Supportive environment: No micromanagement, high ownership culture

- Tools provided: We cover the software you need



YOUR IMPACT



Your work reduces manual admin work.

Your systems improve onboarding and fulfillment speed.

Your dashboards increase visibility into performance metrics.

Your automations help the company scale cleanly.

You do not just build workflows.

You build infrastructure.



TASKS



Systems & Automation

- Build and manage advanced Airtable systems (multi-table databases, linked records, dashboards, KPIs)

- Create and maintain automations using 
, Zapier, and n8n

- Set up Slack automations (channel creation, alerts, routing, reminders, triggers)

- Connect tools across the company (CRM, forms, surveys, Slack, Airtable, Kajabi)

- Monitor automations daily and proactively fix issues

- Reduce manual processes across departments

- Kajabi & Fulfillment Support

- Manage Kajabi automations (onboarding flows, tagging, access control,
 triggers)

- Automate client onboarding (intake - Slack access - CRM tracking - milestone tracking)

- Improve fulfillment systems with dashboards, alerts, and progress tracking

- Build reporting for activation, retention, churn, revenue, and team performance



Architecture & Optimization

- Suggest better system structures as we grow

- Document all workflows clearly

- Build scalable foundations instead of temporary fixes

- Own and protect our automation infrastructure



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken)

- Advanced Airtable experience

- Advanced 
 experience

- Experience with Slack automations and integrations

- Experience with Zapier

- Strong understanding of APIs and webhooks

- Strong systems thinking (you think in architecture, not tasks)

- Ability to translate business problems into technical solutions

- Proactive mindset and high ownership

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace



STRONG PLUS



- n8n experience

- Kajabi automation experience

- CRM integrations (Close is a plus)

- Experience building KPI dashboards

- Experience supporting onboarding and fulfillment workflows

- Experience in fast-growing online businesses

- Experience with 7–9 figure digital brands



WHY JOIN US?



- $1,500–$2,000 per month based on experience

- Long-term stability

- High ownership role

- Direct impact on company growth

- Clear opportunity to become Head of Systems / Automation Lead

- Work with a fast-moving digital company

- All tools and software covered



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with “TECH OPS” as the message title

2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV

#2: Your years of experience with Airtable

#3: Your years of experience with 

#4: Your experience with n8n (if any)

#5: A short description of the most advanced system you have built

#6: One sentence on why you are a strong fit for this role



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



We look forward to building scalable systems with you.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: AI EDITOR VIDEO SPECIALIST
description:
We run two DTC e-commerce brands selling semi-permanent tattoos in the US and EU. We need a video editor who uses AI tools daily — not someone who "knows about AI," someone who lives in it.

You will produce daily short-form videos (TikTok, Reels, Meta Ads) for both brands. You'll generate scenes, transitions, and product visuals using AI tools (Runway, Kling, Seedance, Pika, Midjourney, and whatever dropped this morning). You'll build complete prompt-to-publish workflows with minimal manual footage.

Non-negotiable: you use AI video generation tools every single day. You have strong editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, or DaVinci). You have a portfolio showing AI-generated or AI-enhanced video work. You understand what makes people stop scrolling and buy.

To apply: send your portfolio + a 2-min Loom showing one AI video workflow you actually use. No Loom, no review.

title: J-1 Visa Program Coordinator
description:
Talent Connect Inc is a U.S. Department of State–designated J-1 Visa sponsor organization specializing in internship and trainee programs. The Program Coordinator will be responsible for managing accounts, maintaining client relationships, providing exceptional customer service, and analyzing and editing program documents, maintain communicating with program participants and U.S. employers.



Please note that all candidates must meet the following prerequisites: reliable high-speed internet connection, dual monitor setup, excellent typing skills, strong communication abilities and record a 1–2 minute video introduction via Loom (
)



A high level of integrity is essential to succeed in this role and to grow within the company. Please apply only if you are seeking a long-term opportunity and can commit consistently; this is not intended as a short-term gig.



Duties and responsibilities:

Learn about the J-1 Visa intern/trainee programs, steps of the application process and required documents. (Training materials will be provided)

Communicate on daily basis with employers and participants, to assist with
ing the required forms and help with completing the information/documents required.

Ability to explain programs and application processes clearly and concisely to clients.

Use CRM to update information related to employers.

Creating work schedule and project plans to meet deadlines.

Addressing client/questions

Work independently under general direction related to goals.

Work on U.S. time zone



Detailed job description and bonus structure will be provided to selected participants.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

title: VIDEO CLIPPER — 60,000 PHP/MONTH
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

- 40,000 PHP during the first (test) month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise

- Fully remote position

- Young, supportive team

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

- Select clips that align with our short-form SOPs

- Turn them into 15–45 second Instagram Reels

- Add clean and accurate subtitles

- Ensure smooth audio

- Deliver 2–3 clips per day



You are not creating content from scratch.

You are selecting and packaging the best parts — strategically.

- Follow our short-form SOPs consistently

- Select clips based on audience relevance and brand alignment

- Clearly explain your thought process when submitting clips:

- Ensure subtitles are accurate and easy to understand

- Ensure a smooth audio experience

- Review your work carefully before submitting



Note: There may be additional small tasks as needed.



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above)

- Strong understanding of audience psychology and content-market fit

- Ability to follow and execute based on SOPs

- Previous experience in short-form editing or video clipping

- Strong judgment for identifying valuable, on-brand content

- Detail-oriented with critical thinking skills

- Ability to work independently while staying communicative

- Efficient and solution-focused mindset

/to/v0OA9cFs

title: Senior International Recruiter for U.S. J-1 Visa Programs
description:
The Senior International Recruiter leads Talent Connect’s global recruitment efforts focused on hospitality and culinary talent sourced through post-secondary hospitality schools, culinary institutes, and university programs worldwide. This role builds and manages long-term relationships with hospitality and culinary schools, strengthens candidate pipelines for J-1 Intern and Trainee placements, and supports U.S. host organizations—including restaurants, resorts, hotels, and private clubs—by delivering high-quality, program-aligned participant profiles. The position collaborates closely with Sponsorship Operations, Marketing, and Employer Partnerships to expand Talent Connect’s global reach.



Required Qualifications:



• Bachelor’s degree in Hospitality Management, Culinary Management, Business, International Relations, Education, or related field.

• 5+ years of experience in international recruitment or university partnerships.

• Proven ability to build relationships with culinary and hospitality schools.

• Strong communication skills across cultures and time zones.

• Strong organizational and pipeline management skills.



Required Character Values and Prerequisites:



Integrity - shows honesty, ethics, and trustworthiness. Holding two jobs simultaneously is not permitted and may lead to legal and contractual consequences. 

Accountability - shows ownership, reliability, and follow-through



• Complete a typing test and attach a screenshot of your result. 
 

• Provide a copy or screenshot of your IQ test result. 

• Confirm that you have access to a dual-monitor setup and provide a photo of your workstation.

• Provide a screenshot of your internet speed test, as a high-speed connection is required.

• Confirm your availability to work on California time zone, from 6:00 AM to 3:00 PM Pacific Time.

title: Travel Assistant (Insurance Support) | Full-Time | Training Provided
description:
Travel Insurance Assistant / Specialist



(Full-Time, Remote, EST)



PLEASE READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING



$7/Hour Starting Rate | 40 Hours | Full-Time



Opportunity for increases based on performance

Strong performers in this role have earned consistent pay increases.

We review every application manually, so thoughtful, tailored applications are prioritized.



Full-time remote role focused on:



Travel insurance coordination and related tasks: drafting travel insurance for review, calling Viking/speaking directly with guests, and maintaining HubSpot CRM and trackers.



DO NOT APPLY if:



-You do not have clear, confident spoken English that can be easily understood by senior clients.



-You do not have experience in the travel industry or working with detailed, client-facing processes.



-You submit template applications or generic resumes. Please keep your introduction natural and personal so we can understand you.



-You're seeking part-time, short-term, or freelance work.



-You cannot commit to U.S. Eastern Time business hours (9am–5pm EST, night shift PHP)



-You do not carefully follow application instructions. Applications missing steps may not be reviewed.



DO APPLY if:



-You have worked in the travel industry OR have strong experience handling detailed client support, bookings, or coordination tasks.



-You have experience explaining policies, handling client questions, or working with structured documentation (insurance experience is a strong advantage, but not required).



-You can send a short video introduction.



-You are looking for a long-term, full-time remote role with a stable team that invests in your growth.



-You are professional, detail-oriented, and take pride in doing things correctly.



-You can work independently, follow documented processes, and ask questions when something is unclear.



-If you have handled complex client situations, briefly mention one example in your application.



-If you have worked with senior or high-touch clients before, please highlight this.



About Us



We are a boutique travel agency based in Atlanta, GA (EST). We specialize in luxury river cruises with Viking and provide high-touch support for our clients.



We're warm, organized, and focused on delivering excellent service. Our team is small, collaborative, and values doing things right.



We have clear processes (SOPs) for most tasks. You will be trained and supported.



We're looking for someone who wants to grow into this role long-term.



Who We're Looking For



Must-Have:



Prior experience as a virtual assistant or in a similar remote support role



Excellent written English with a professional and friendly tone



Proven ability to work independently and manage detailed tasks



High attention to detail, follow-through, and accountability



Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace



Bonus Points:



Experience with TripMate, Allianz, or Travel Insured



Any experience with Viking Cruises or river cruising



HubSpot CRM experience (or experience with similar CRMs)



Familiarity with booking systems, invoices, or client records



Experience reviewing, explaining, or processing insurance (any industry)



Your Role



As our Virtual Assistant, you'll be responsible for:



Drafting client
s



Updating HubSpot CRM and internal trackers



Calling Viking Cruises and partners to verify information or resolve questions



Supporting the insurance department with administrative tasks



Accuracy matters. Small mistakes in names, dates, or policies can impact the client experience.



You will be trained and supported as you learn our systems.



So expectations are clear:



You'll work directly with our team as internal support



Guest/client
s are drafts for review



You'll have autonomy for routine tasks, with guidance on when to escalate



You'll be supported by an experienced team invested in your success



Schedule



Target hours: 9:00am to 5:00pm EST (evening/night shift in the Philippines — please confirm this works for you)



Hours may vary slightly based on business needs



Saturday coverage may be introduced later via rotation



How to Apply



Applications that don't follow these instructions may not be reviewed. This helps us identify candidates with strong attention to detail.



Candidates who clearly follow all steps are prioritized.



Step 1:



Send your application with the subject line or first sentence including: "Meghan's #1"



Step 2:



Include a short video introduction that:



Explains your relevant experience (insurance experience is a bonus, not required)



Shares why you're interested in this role



Describes what excites you about working with a team like ours



Keep it natural and concise. We are looking for clarity, not perfection.



Step 3:



Attach your CV or resume (if using Google Drive, ensure access is granted)



We're excited to meet someone who cares about doing great work and wants to grow with a strong team.



If that sounds like you — we encourage you to apply today.

title: Sales Operations Specialist
description:
If you are looking for a mundane, punch-the-clock job, please skip this post.



We are a fast-moving, 3-founder startup (current YC Spring applicants) building Nexeo.ai — an ambitious AI-driven visibility and optimization platform. We are leaving traditional, clunky data dashboards in the past and building an intuitive, blazing-fast, "Apple-level" expert workspace. This is not just a gig: We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who will grow with us, push the limits of what is possible, and build the best possible experiences in today’s world.

We do not care about your age, your years of corporate experience, or your formal degrees. We care about your slope. If you are hungry, detail-obsessed, and driven to build something world-class, we want you.



About the Company:



Angry Digital Inc. is a US-based AI technology company building Nexeo.ai — an AI Search Intelligence platform that helps digital agencies track, measure, and optimize how their clients appear in AI-powered search results (ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, and more). We’re a fast-moving founding team backed by real revenue from our e-commerce portfolio and owned media properties. This is a ground-floor opportunity at a company building category-defining software.



The Role:



You’ll be the engine behind our sales pipeline. Our Head of Sales needs a sharp, detail-oriented operator who can research prospects, qualify leads, manage CRM data, and ensure every outreach sequence runs like clockwork. You won’t be cold calling or closing deals — you’ll be building the infrastructure that makes closing possible.



Core Responsibilities:



-Source and research prospects using 
, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and company websites

-Score and qualify leads against our Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) using documented criteria

-Enrich contact records with company size, tech stack, key decision-maker details, and their current situation

-Maintain CRM hygiene in ClickUp — update statuses, log activities, tag leads by stage

-Prepare pre-call research briefs for the Head of Sales before discovery calls

-Monitor inbox replies to outbound sequences and classify response intent (interested, objection, OOO, bounce, not interested)

-Track outbound sequence performance metrics (open rates, reply rates, meeting conversion)

-Assist with drafting personalized
 sequences following approved templates and brand voice

-Maintain and update sales playbook documentation as processes evolve

-Flag high-intent signals (funding rounds, leadership changes, job postings) that indicate buying readiness



Required Skills & Experience:



-2+ years in sales operations, lead generation, or SDR support role

-Proficient with 
 or similar prospecting tools (ZoomInfo, Lusha, Hunter)

-Experience with CRM systems (ClickUp, HubSpot, Salesforce, or Pipedrive)

-Strong English written communication — you will draft research briefs and
 copy

-High attention to detail and ability to follow documented SOPs consistently

-Comfortable working US Eastern Time hours (minimum 4-hour overlap)

-Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace



Bonus Skills (Not Required):



-Experience in SaaS, digital marketing, or agency environments

-Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator advanced search

-Experience with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) for research acceleration

-Basic understanding of SEO, digital advertising, or e-commerce



Compensation & Details:



-Salary: USD $490.00–$740.00/month depending on experience

-Type: Full-time (40 hours/week)

-Schedule: Monday–Friday, flexible start with minimum 4-hour US ET overlap

-Location: 100% Remote (Philippines-based)

-Benefits: 13th-month pay, performance bonuses tied to pipeline metrics, clear growth path to Sales Operations Manager as we scale



How to Apply:



Send your resume and a short Loom video (under 3 minutes) introducing yourself and walking through one example of a lead research project you completed. Bonus points if your Loom shows your actual screen and tools, not just a talking head.

Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) / Appointment Setter
description:
About Leda

We make LEDA, a learning experience platform that makes leadership development easy! We use expert interviews, animations, games, self-assessments and practical activities to turn managers into better leaders.

We work with CEOs and People & Culture leaders across Australia and APAC to help them develop the many people in their organisations. Our mission? Better organisations, by making it easy for companies to develop their established and emerging leaders. High quality and fun leadership development for all!

We're a small, profitable startup based in Melbourne. We like to laugh and have fun. And yes — you'll get leadership training too.



The Role

We're looking for someone to join our small but growing team with an SDR background wanting an accelerated pathway to Inside Sales.

This is a rare opportunity to become a critical member of a profitable start-up that has a real and positive impact on people's lives.



What You'll Be Doing



Converting inbound leads from our campaigns into conversations with the founders and yourself

Calling warmed leads (40–50 calls per day)

Nurturing and growing new business opportunities within the SMB segment (companies with <600 employees) in APAC

Understanding prospective customers' pain points and educating them on Leda's value

Guiding prospects through the sales process with the founder

Managing some opportunities to close, readying yourself to move into an Inside Sales role



Skills You'll Need



Minimum 12 months experience in an SDR or Inside Sales role

Highly empathetic and likeable on the phone, with great communication skills to explain, influence and persuade

Clear English with confident, friendly delivery

Preferably experience in tech, training, online learning, or selling to HR / People and Culture teams

Familiarity with Australian business culture is a plus





Hours & Pay

Schedule:



Part-time to start: 20 hours/week (Mon–Fri, 10am–12pm and 1–3pm AEST)

Path to full-time for top performers



Compensation:



$7 USD/hour base

$40 USD per sat meeting

Part-time earnings: ~$680–780/month

Full-time performers: $1,400–1,600+/month



Technical Requirements:



Your own computer or laptop (not a phone or tablet)

Stable internet connection (minimum 10 Mbps)

Headset with microphone

Quiet workspace with minimal background noise



Prove you can deliver, and we'll give you more hours and a clear path to Inside Sales.



How to Apply



Fill in this form

(
/form/623bfc36-e96a-4fc
a795ea5cdb)

and we'll send you our short screening process (about 30–45 minutes). It involves a speaking assessment, sales simulations, and a short video recording.

You'll have 72 hours to complete it. No resume needed — just show us what you can do.

Thank you very much for your time and interest!

Team Leda

title: Short series video editor
description:
We’re hiring a video editor to craft high-quality short-form episodes (1–3 minutes each, anywhere from 3-6 episodes per series) with a clean, cinematic, and story-first approach.



This is not typical TikTok-style editing. We’re looking for someone who prioritizes pacing, emotion, and visual storytelling over flashy effects or 
-driven edits.

title: Short Form Video Editor - Games!
description:
I am looking to hire a short form video editor to handle a high volume of simple game content, starting with a test run. I have hundreds of videos currently needing edits, with more being produced regularly. We play games such as Tapple, Spindoodle, Timer Games, and games we make up. 



Our goal is to grow our entertainment & gaming channels from scratch so an ideal candidate would have a viral eye, good ideas for pacing and previous experience editing short form content. We would like our short form videos to garner significant amounts of views so its important the editing helps reinforce that. 



For this test, I want to see several different reels of the same footage that can be posted to Instagram, TikTok, and Youtube Shorts. I will provide 2-10 minutes of raw footage per game and want a final video that's up to ~120 seconds. Your goal is to create engaging content that will help grow our social media channels. Great videos will have superior retention rates and prolonged watch time. 



Goals:

- Hook the viewer within the first 2 seconds

- Maximize retention to keep viewers watching until the end

- Emphasize emotion and reactions

- Make the video understandable without sound

- No empty space

- Create loopable endings if possible



Please let me know if you are interested, and I can send over the footage.



Suggested Requirements:

• Proficient in CapCut and or other softwares to deliver short form content

• Strong understanding of short-form content - hooks, pacing, captions, transitions

• Reliable internet connection and ability to meet deadlines consistently

• Good communication in English (written)

title: Meta Ads & Content Creation Specialist

2. Intermediate to expert-level experience in
 & Instagram campaign management.

HOW TO APPLY

We truly appreciate your interest, and while only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next stage, every application is valued.

title: Video Editor + Creative Director
description:
Video Editor + Creative Director — Food Startup Disrupting How a City Eats



We grow some of the world's most nutritional foods and deliver same day. We're partnering with chefs, restaurants, gyms, and wellness brands — and we're just getting started.

Chef collabs and restaurant features

title: SEO Marketing Specialist
description:
Full job description



Our Marketing Department is looking for a skilled SEO Marketing Specialist to join our growing team at Lumaprints. This is a long-term remote position open to candidates based in the Philippines who are interested in building a stable and growth-oriented career with our company.



In this role, you will take ownership of both on-site SEO performance and off-site authority building. You will be responsible for maintaining and optimizing our website, improving search rankings, and ensuring all content across our platform is accurate, well-written, and aligned with SEO best practices.



You will work directly on our WordPress website editing pages, optimizing HTML elements, and continuously improving product pages to maximize visibility and conversions. At the same time, you will drive external SEO growth by securing backlinks, publishing articles, and increasing Lumaprints’ presence across third-party platforms, media, and high-authority websites.



In addition, you will play a key role in ensuring Lumaprints remains visible in AI-driven search environments, including generative search engines and AI-powered discovery tools. This includes optimizing content for structured data, semantic relevance, and discoverability across emerging AI platforms.



The ideal candidate has a strong SEO background, is comfortable working with HTML and WordPress, and understands that modern SEO goes beyond traditional rankings, it requires building authority, visibility, and presence across both search engines and AI ecosystems.



Essential Duties and Responsibilities:

 - Optimize website content and structure to improve search engine rankings

 - Review, rewrite, and enhance all product pages to ensure high-quality, SEO-friendly content

 - Edit and maintain website pages using WordPress and HTML

 - Conduct keyword research and implement effective on-page SEO strategies

 - Ensure proper use of meta tags, headers, schema, internal linking, and other SEO elements

 - Perform regular site audits and resolve technical SEO issues

 - Monitor website performance and identify opportunities for improvement

 - Maintain consistency in content quality, tone, and formatting across all pages

 - Collaborate with the marketing team to align SEO efforts with campaigns and product launches

 - Stay updated on the latest SEO trends, algorithm updates, and best practices



External-Facing Growth Responsibilities:

 - Develop and execute strategies to expand Lumaprints’ presence across external platforms

 - Secure high-quality backlinks through outreach, partnerships, and guest posting

 - Identify and connect with relevant websites, blogs, and publications for feature opportunities

 - Pitch and publish articles, brand mentions, and features in industry-related media

 - Build relationships with content creators, publishers, and website owners

 - Drive outbound SEO initiatives to increase domain authority and search visibility

 - Ensure consistent brand representation across all third-party platforms



AI Optimization Responsibilities:

 - Optimize website content for AI-driven search engines and generative search platforms

 - Structure content to improve visibility in AI-generated answers and summaries

 - Implement schema markup and structured data to enhance machine readability

 - Adapt content for semantic search and intent-based discovery

 - Monitor performance in AI search environments and identify growth opportunities

 - Stay updated on trends in AI SEO, generative AI visibility, and search evolution

 - Collaborate with the team to align SEO strategies with emerging AI technologies



Requirements:

* Proven experience in Search Engine Optimization (SEO)

* Strong understanding of on-page, off-page, and technical SEO

* Experience working with WordPress (content management, plugins, and page editing)

* Ability to read and edit HTML

* Strong writing and editing skills with excellent attention to detail

* Experience optimizing e-commerce or product pages

* Knowledge of backlink strategies and external SEO growth

* Familiarity with AI-driven search or content optimization

* Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret performance data

* Ability to work independently in a remote setup

* Strong commitment to long-term growth with the company



Preferred Qualifications:

 / Experience with SEO tools (e.g., Ahrefs, SEMrush, Google Search Console, Google Analytics)

 / Basic knowledge of technical SEO (site speed, indexing, crawlability)

 / Familiarity with content strategy and keyword planning

 / Experience working with US-based or international companies

 / Experience optimizing content for AI search tools and generative platforms



Work Setup: Remote (Philippines-based candidates only)

Compensation: $6.00 – $7.50/hour (rate may be negotiated based on experience and skill level)

Schedule: Monday to Friday Pacific Standard Time (exact schedule to be discussed during hiring process)





** To apply for this role, kindly share your CV in a Google Drive/Dropbox link format via direct message.**

title: Video Editor (Real Estate & Social Media Content)

You’ll work closely with our marketing team to bring ideas to life and ensure all content aligns with brand, strategy, and performance goals.



Key Responsibilities

What We’re Looking For

title: AI UGC Video Creator (Veo / Kling / Runway) – Health & Wellness Brand
description:
We're building a health & wellness content brand that's 100% powered by AI-generated UGC-style videos — talking-head content, B-roll, product showcases — all made with AI, no real creators on camera.

If you already know what it means to generate a realistic AI person, animate them with natural lip-sync, hand gestures, and real emotion using tools like Veo, Kling, Runway, Pika, or HeyGen — keep reading. This role is for you.

You'll work directly with the founder producing short-form vertical videos (TikTok, Reels,
) in the health/wellness/natural remedies niche. Think: scroll-stopping hooks, expressive AI characters, and cinematic B-roll — all generated, not filmed.

This is a long-term, ongoing role with consistent work for the right person.

title: Compliance Research VA — US Healthcare / Medicare Billing
description:
Job Title: Compliance Research VA — US Healthcare / Medicare Billing



Company: HospiceShield Compliance — 
 — we help legitimate hospice operators across California protect their licenses during a major federal enforcement sweep.



What This Job Is: When a hospice operator pays us $3,995 for a compliance review, you are the person who does the work. You receive their submitted documents — Medicare billing records, patient census, staff roster, and facility license — and you run them through our 20-point compliance checklist. You identify issues, score each checkpoint, and populate our written report template with your findings.



Your report goes to a paying client. It must be accurate, clear, and professional every single time.



Your Daily Work: — Receive client documents from our Office Manager — Run the 20-point checklist against the client's submitted records — Use Claude AI as your analysis tool — we train you on exactly how — Populate the Shield Review report template with your findings — Deliver the completed report to the Office Manager within 5 business days — Flag any urgent findings immediately — same day



You Must Have — No Exceptions: — Fluent written and spoken English. Your reports go directly to US clients. Grammar and clarity are non-negotiable. — Real knowledge of the US Medicare system — how billing works, what Medicare Part A covers, what CMS is — Experience working with US healthcare documents — billing records, clinical records, or compliance documents — Extreme attention to detail — you are reviewing documents for errors that could expose a business to federal investigation — Reliable internet and quiet workspace during US Pacific Time hours



Strong Plus If You Have: — Background in hospice, home health, or long-term care compliance — Experience with CMS regulations, CDPH licensing, or Medicare hospice benefit rules — Prior work at a US healthcare law firm, medical billing company, or compliance consulting firm — Experience using AI tools for research and document analysis



Compensation: $700 to $1,000 per month depending on experience and English proficiency. Starting part-time with potential to grow full-time as client volume increases. Performance bonuses available.



How To Apply — Read This Carefully: Applications missing any of the following will be deleted without response.



Start your application with the word SHIELD in all caps on the first line. This confirms you read the full posting.

Record a 90-second voice recording and include the link. Introduce yourself, describe your US healthcare experience, and explain in your own words what Medicare Part A covers. Upload to Google Drive or Vocaroo and paste the link in your application.

Include 2 to 3 sentences describing a specific time you worked with US healthcare or billing documents.

Include your expected monthly rate.

We move fast. Qualified applicants will be contacted within 24 hours for a short interview.

description:

Specializing in single-family homes, ADUs, SB9 projects, multi-family dwellings, and light industrial developments, we are a diverse team dedicated to excellence in every project. With an array of services covering the entire real estate spectrum, from land acquisition to property listing, our firm offers a unique environment for growth and learning.

We are seeking a detail-oriented CAD Drafter to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for creating precise technical drawings and plans using computer-aided design (CAD) software. This role requires strong attention to detail, technical knowledge, and the ability to collaborate with engineers, architects, and project managers to bring designs to life.

Develop and revise detailed technical drawings, blueprints, and schematics using CAD software.

Interpret design specifications, sketches, and notes to produce accurate plans.

Strong knowledge of drafting standards, construction methods, and technical terminology.

Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills.

Strong communication and teamwork abilities.

Experience in [industry-specific focus, e.g., mechanical, civil, electrical, or architectural drafting] preferred.





Preferred Skills

Familiarity with Building Information Modeling (BIM).

Experience with 3D visualization tools.

Knowledge of project management software.

Ability to work under tight deadlines and manage multiple projects simultaneously.





Fully Remote

Schedule: 9:00 AM–5:30 PM PST, Monday–Friday (12:00 AM–8:30 AM PH Time)

description:
We’re an e commerce team testing multiple products every month and we’re looking for an ads strategist to join us long term.

We need someone who understands how to find the right angle, build the right campaign structure, guide creatives, and make decisions from data.



Main tasks:

• Research the product, market, competitors, and target audience

• Find strong marketing angles, hooks, desires, pain points, and positioning

• Build the ad strategy for each product launch

• Define campaign structure, audience testing, budget distribution, and scaling plan

• Give clear ad directions to the creative team for statics, videos, and UGC

• Write briefs for creatives, hooks, offers, and messaging angles

• Analyze ad performance and identify what to cut, improve, retest, or scale

• Improve CPA, CTR, conversion rate, and overall profitability

• Work with the team to constantly test new ideas and new products



What we need from you:

• Strong experience with e commerce paid ads

• Good understanding of Meta ads, testing strategy, and scaling logic

• Strong marketing sense, not just technical ad manager skills

• Ability to read data and turn it into clear action

• Someone proactive, sharp, and serious about performance



Work style:

We test many products every month, so this is long term work with constant volume for the right person.

A Loan Processor is responsible for reviewing and processing loan applications, collecting all necessary documents, ensuring loans comply with the institution's guidelines and regulatory requirements. They work closely with loan officers, underwriters, and applicants to facilitate the loan approval process. 



Responsibilities: 

-Loan Application 

-Document Collection

-Communication with loan officers, underwriters

-Verify calculations, loan terms, and othe critical details

-Collaborate with transaction coordinators and other parties to facilitate the loan approval process



Requirements: 

-Bachelor's degree

-Over 1 year of experience in loan processrelated role

-Strong knowledge of loan products, lending policies, and regulations 

-Excellent attention to detail, organization, and time management skills 

-Ability to work in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment



PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR RESUME (PDF) WHEN APPLYING

title: Community and Discord Manager
description:
Full-Time • Remote • $800-$1000 USD



Company Overview

We build consumer brands differently — with the speed of a startup, the discipline of private equity, and the creative engine of a high-performance growth team.

Think of us as a mini Unilever, but leaner, faster, and designed for direct-response success.



We operate multiple brands generating $40M+ in annual revenue, each built on a 3-year scale-and-exit model, supported by centralized shared services across media, creative, operations, and product.



Our mission:

Build brands that leave lasting impressions — and exit them at their peak.



Our culture is built on:

???? Competitive Greatness

? Speed to Execution

???? Team Empowerment

???? Relentless Ownership



If you thrive in fast-moving, community-driven, performance-first environments, this is your team.



Role Overview

The Community & 
 Manager owns the internal creator community experience for TikTok Shop. You will be responsible for building a vibrant, high-performing creator ecosystem that drives weekly GMV through engagement, coaching, education, events, and direct communication.



You’re part community architect, part coach, part operations manager — ensuring our hundreds of internal creators are informed, motivated, and delivering performance-aligned content.



This is a full-time North America role with high visibility, high accountability, and direct impact on revenue.



Key Responsibilities

Own and manage the internal creator 
 community, ensuring it is active, organized, and performance-driven.



Build a full innovative Tiktok Shop creator source to help onboard and inspire a new generation of creators



Build and execute the creator engagement strategy, including events, announcements, incentives, and challenges.



Coach creators directly on content quality, best practices, TikTok Shop features, and performance optimization.



Run daily community operations — answering questions, moderating discussions, sharing updates, and directing creators to resources.



Host bi-weekly coaching sessions or AMAs, supporting creators on trends, hooks, and performance tactics.



Develop channel structures that support education, communication, and collaboration (announcements, wins, inspiration, peer chat).



Surface top performers and inactive creators to the Creator Partnerships Manager for incentive or re-engagement strategies.



Create digestible TikTok updates and distribute them to keep creators informed about platform changes.



Maintain the resource library — best-performing hooks, starter kits, FAQs, selling guides, and trend recaps.



Collect creator feedback via polls, surveys, and community discussions to improve the program.



Drive creator retention through recognition programs, incentives, and ongoing support.

 

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

Creator engagement rate inside 
 (daily active users, message participation, session attendance)

Creator content output per week

GMV generated by internal creators

Creator retention, activation rate, and churn reduction

Response time and quality of community support

 

Success Benchmarks (30–60–90 Days)

30 Days

Learn all systems, creator archetypes, and community workflows.

Take ownership of daily 
 operations.

Launch the updated community engagement calendar.

 

60 Days

Host your first coaching sessions and implement new engagement formats.

Improve community response times and overall participation.

Launch a resource library and trend-sharing workflow.

 

90 Days

Deliver measurable lift in creator output and GMV.

Build a scalable community framework that supports 300+ active creators.

Establish monthly challenges, incentive programs, and coaching systems.

 

Required Skills & Qualifications

Must-Have

2 - 4+ years of experience in community management, creator relations, influencer marketing, or social media

Deep understanding of TikTok culture, creator behavior, and social-first content

Excellent communication and relationship-building skills

Experience hosting events, workshops, or live coaching sessions

Highly organized and able to manage high-volume community engagement

Fast execution and a proactive mindset

Experience using 
 communities at scale

 

Nice-to-Have

Familiarity with TikTok Shop, GMV Max, or social commerce ecosystems

Background in content creation, trend analysis, or creative strategy

Experience building creator programs or educational resources

 

Who Should Apply?

? YES — Ideal Candidates

Natural community builders who love connecting people

Creators or creator-ecosystem operators who understand content

High-energy communicators with a coaching mindset

People who thrive in high-speed, high-impact environments

Operators who want direct influence on revenue through community

 

???? NO — Do Not Apply If

You dislike hosting discussions or coaching creators

You prefer predictable, low-interaction roles

You struggle with organization or high message volume

You avoid taking initiative or owning outcomes

Why Join Us?

Build and lead the central hub of our entire creator ecosystem

High autonomy with direct impact on weekly GMV

Work with elite growth, media, and creative operators

Be part of a high-performance culture that values speed, clarity, and results

Massive opportunities for role expansion as community scales



Compensation & Benefits

$800-$1000 per month

Performance-based bonuses

Equity opportunity

Remote setup



Application - submit your application through this link:
