title: Executive Assistant (Operations & Development-Real Estate)
description:
About Us

We are a premier U.S.-based real estate development and home building group with a heavy footprint in the San Francisco Bay Area. Our portfolio focuses on high-quality residential projects, ranging from ADUs and single-family homes to large-scale community developments. We value speed, clarity, and excellence. We are seeking a high-performance Executive Assistant who thrives in a fast-moving, execution-heavy environment.



Position Summary

The Executive Assistant (EA) will directly support the VP of Development / Chief Asset Management Officer with daily communications, scheduling, and rigorous execution follow-through. You will act as an operational partner, ensuring that land acquisition, project entitlement, and permitting tasks move forward without friction. This role requires exceptional organizational skills and a strong background in real estate development or architectural operations.



Key Responsibilities

1. Communication & Stakeholder Triage

- Manage and filter high-volume inboxes; draft concise, professional replies to city officials, architects, and contractors.

- Track correspondence with partners, consultants, and clients to ensure zero communication backlog.

- Maintain a professional tone in all high-stakes external communications.



2. Task & Project Management

- Maintain and update complex project trackers in Lark, Google Sheets, or Salesforce.

- Proactively follow up with internal teams and external consultants to ensure project milestones (permitting, site visits, and escrow) stay on schedule.

- Help implement and manage CRM or task automation systems to streamline project workflows.



3. Scheduling & Cross-Border Coordination

- Manage calendars across multiple entities and time zones (U.S.–Asia).

- Schedule internal team syncs, consultant meetings, site visits, and board meetings.

- Prepare detailed agendas and distribute "Action-Item" recap notes with a clear reminder system for all parties involved.



4. Document & Research Support

- Organize and maintain digital files (blueprints, permits, and reports) in Dropbox/Box.

- Assist in preparing project presentations, meeting briefs, and development progress summaries.

- Support real estate development research, including zoning analysis and city-specific ordinance tracking.



Qualifications

- Experience: Minimum 2+ years supporting senior executives in Real Estate Development, Architectural Design, Home Building or related fields.

- Industry Knowledge: Understanding of residential project flow (LOIs, pro formas, and permitting timelines).

- Tech Stack: High proficiency in Lark, Google Workspace,and Dropbox, Microsoft Suites, Canva and project management softwares.

- Language: Excellent written and spoken English

- Presence: Sharp, organized, detail-oriented, discreet, and proactive. 



Compensation & Structure

- Full-time remote role with partial Pacific Time overlap.

- Competitive base salary/retainer + performance bonuses.

- Long-term growth potential within the investment and operations leadership track.



 Submit your resume in a pdf format.

title: Investment Associate
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented Investment Associate to support investor documentation, onboarding, and fund operations. This role works closely with investment, accounting, and compliance teams to ensure accurate records, timely communications, and smooth operational processes.



Key Responsibilities

- Draft, review, and process investor-facing documents, including promissory notes, subscription agreements, and related onboarding materials, ensuring compliance with internal policies and regulatory requirements.

- Support investor onboarding by organizing and maintaining investor records, updating investor files, and managing data.

- Assist in managing investor
 communications, including sending notifications and responding to investor inquiries in a timely manner.

- Prepare and submit investment capital inflow and outflow approvals, ensuring accuracy and procedural compliance.

- Provide administrative and coordination support for fund operations and compliance-related work.



Requirements

- Proficiency in English, both written and basic spoken, sufficient for routine work communication and documentation.

- Highly responsible and detail-oriented, able to accurately complete transactional and support tasks by following established processes.

- Strong organizational skills and a disciplined approach to file management, ensuring records are complete, accurate, and well-structured.

- Proficient in Excel, Word, and PDF tools, with the ability to prepare and maintain documents and data according to templates and guidelines.

- Good communication and follow-through skills, able to collaborate with accounting, tax, and compliance teams and handle investor-related information professionally.



 Send your application along with your Resume in a PDF Format.

title: Video Editor
description:

This role will start around $520 a month and will increase to more full time wage over next several months as the role stabilizes and alignment is solid on both sides.  



Will need around 2 to 4 videos/small projects completed/worked on per week. (Sometimes a little more complex, mostly very simple edits with all the footage provided as well as project files and selects broken time on the timelines). -corporate videos

-Short ads

-short highlights with small interview and brolll

title: Cinematic Video Editor Commercials
description:
Here's a punchy job post for that:



Cinematic Video Editor – Camping Brand

About Us

We're a camping brand creating content that makes people want to get off the couch and into the wild. We need an editor who can make our footage feel like a feature film, not a YouTube tutorial.

The Role

We're looking for a cinematic video editor with commercial experience who can take raw footage and turn it into visually stunning, emotionally driven content. You should be just as comfortable cutting a tight 30-second spot as you are crafting a longer brand film.

What You'll Do



Edit commercial-quality video content for our camping brand across ads, social, and brand storytelling

Color grade footage shot in S-Log to achieve a rich, cinematic look

Craft pacing, transitions, and sound design that elevate the storytelling

Collaborate with our creative team on direction, revisions, and final delivery

Manage and organize project files and assets professionally



What You Must Bring



Proven experience editing commercial or brand content — outdoor/adventure industry a big plus

Strong proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and DaVinci Resolve (not just Final Cut Pro)

Expert-level color grading skills, specifically experience working with S-Log footage

A sharp cinematic eye — you understand framing, pacing, mood, and tone

A portfolio or reel that makes us say "we need this person"



Bonus Points



Motion graphics or After Effects capability

Experience with drone or action cam footage

Understanding of delivery specs across platforms (broadcast, YouTube, Instagram, TikTok)



To Apply

Send your reel or portfolio along with a brief note on your experience. If your work speaks for itself, we want to hear from it.

Renee Sobotka

title: Senior Accountant (Real Estate)
description:
Hiring: Senior Accountant - Short-Term Rentals



We’re hiring a full-time Senior Accountant with deep, hands-on experience in short-term rental accounting (Airbnb, VRBO).



Key Responsibilities:

• Reconcile Airbnb & VRBO payouts to PMS and bank deposits (Stripe/PayPal)

• Record and audit gross bookings, host fees, cleaning fees, and platform commissions

• Manage owner statements, payouts, and trust/liability accounts

• Maintain clean chart of accounts aligned with STR operations

• Support financial reporting and property-level profitability analysis



Requirements:

• Strong proficiency in Sage Intacct or QuickBooks Online

• Experience with PMS systems (Guesty, Hostaway, AppFolio, etc.)

• Solid understanding of multi-entity, trust accounting, and OTA integrations

• Advanced Excel skills (recs, tie-outs, large data sets)



Schedule: Full-time, PST hours



Please do NOT apply if you have no experience in short-term rentals.



Send a link to your resume and specific STR experience.



What We Offer

• HMO coverage

• 13th month pay

• Paid holidays

• Paid time off (PTO)

• Remote setup

title: Logistics Support Representative
description:
Job Title: LTL Customer Support & Sales Representative

Location: [ Remote]

Job Type: Part-time to Full-Time

Department: Logistics / Sales





About the Role



We are seeking a motivated and customer-focused LTL (Less-Than-Truckload) Customer Support & Sales Representative to join our growing team. This role combines relationship management, operational support, and sales development. You’ll be the primary point of contact for customers, ensuring smooth shipment coordination while identifying opportunities to grow accounts and increase revenue. As well as the point of contact with LTL carriers.



Key Responsibilities



Customer Support

-Serve as the main contact for LTL customers via phone,
, and chat

-Assist with shipment booking, tracking, rate quotes, and issue resolution

-Proactively communicate delays, service updates, and delivery statuses

-Handle claims, billing inquiries, and service exceptions with professionalism





Sales & Account Growth

-Build and maintain strong relationships with existing customers

-Identify upselling and cross-selling opportunities within current accounts

-Generate and follow up on leads to acquire new LTL business

-Prepare and present rate quotes and service proposals

-Meet or exceed monthly sales and retention targets





Operations Coordination

-Work closely with carriers, dispatch, and internal teams to ensure on-time service

-Negotiate rates with carriers when needed to remain competitive

-Maintain accurate shipment and customer records in CRM/TMS systems

Qualifications

-1–3+ years of experience in LTL logistics, freight brokerage, or transportation (preferred)

-Strong understanding of LTL shipping processes, pricing, and carriers

-Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

-Sales-oriented mindset with a focus on customer satisfaction

-Ability to multitask and thrive in a fast-paced environment

-Proficiency in CRM and transportation management systems (TMS) is a plus





Key Skills

-Customer service excellence

-Negotiation and sales closing

-Problem-solving and conflict resolution

-Time management and organization

-Attention to detail





Compensation & Benefits

-Competitive base salary + commission/bonus structure after probational period

-Paid time off 

-Career growth opportunities

-Supportive and team-oriented work environment



Why Join Us?

Join a company that values relationships, reliability, and results. You’ll play a critical role in helping businesses move their freight efficiently while growing your career in logistics and sales.



Apply today to be part of a dynamic and fast-growing logistics team! 



How to apply: PLEASE SEND OVER YOUR RESUME AND ANSWER THE FOLLOWING QUESTIONS BELOW.



1) How many years of experience in total do you have in Logistics?

2 )Do you have experience in booking LTL shipments with a TMS?

title: Part-Time Video Editor for YouTube Crochet & Macrame Tutorials
description:
I'm looking for a skilled video editor to help me edit my craft tutorial videos in Adobe Premiere Pro. I need someone who can cut footage down, remove awkward pauses, breaths, uhs and ums, add unobtrusive background music from my provided tracks, and generally make the editing process smoother for me.



Job Details:



Pay: $8/hour



Hours: Flexible and as-needed - work volume will vary. Some weeks may have a few videos, other weeks may have none. This is not a guaranteed set-hours position.



Commitment: Long-term for the right person - as we build a good working relationship I'd love to send more videos your way



Video Length: Final edited videos are typically 10-25 minutes long



Editing Time: My videos typically take me 2-4 hours to edit. I'd love for you to be able to work within that time frame or faster -- I'm not a professional editor so I imagine an experienced one could do it even more efficiently!



Responsibilities:



- Edit raw footage in Adobe Premiere Pro to create a rough cut



- Trim unnecessary parts, remove awkward pauses, filler words, and background noise interruptions



- Add unobtrusive background music from my provided track library (music should only play during non-speaking segments and must stay low and non-distracting)



- Make basic adjustments (color, exposure, etc. if needed)



- Deliver the complete Premiere project file (not just the exported video) so I can open it and make final tweaks myself



- Share and receive files via Google Drive



Requirements:



- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro



- Fluent in English with good communication skills



- Experience editing long-form YouTube videos (tutorial experience a plus!)



- Comfortable with flexible, variable workloads



- Reliable and responsive even during slower periods



- Able to deliver organized Premiere project files ready for client review



Bonus Points If You:



- Have experience editing craft or hobby tutorials



- Understand pacing for educational content



- Can work efficiently with minimal revisions



This is a flexible role with no guaranteed hours, but I'm looking for someone I can build a long-term working relationship with. As my channel grows and we find a good rhythm together, there's real potential for more consistent work over time.



To apply, please send:



- A short introduction about yourself and your editing experience



- Links to 2-3 samples of long-form videos you've edited (YouTube links preferred)



- Your availability and how soon you can start

title: AI Tools, Research & Operations Manager — American Political Strategy Firm
description:
LOVE WORKING WITH AI TOOLS

AND GROW YOUR OPERATIONAL MANAGEMENT EXPERIENCE?



Work directly with an experienced American political strategist who is genuinely invested in your growth.

Build real, marketable skills in AI, digital marketing, SEO, political research, and operations management.



THIS JOB IS DIFFERENT

You’ll use Claude, Gemini, Google AI Studio, and NotebookLM as everyday professional tools. We want someone who follows AI developments the way others follow sports — keeping up with new features, watching tutorials, and reading release notes because they find it genuinely interesting, not because it’s required.



You don’t need to arrive knowing everything. You need to be curious, resourceful, and the kind of person who likes to figure things out. Many of these skills can be learned quickly using AI tools — and we’ll show you how.



AREAS OF RESPONSIBILITY

AI Tools and Knowledge Management

Organize AI research systems, help set up workflows in Google Workspace using AI tools, build prompt libraries, and stay current on new AI features and bring them to our work.



SEO and Website

Competitive research, keyword updates, and website improvements using AI tools. No prior SEO experience required — if you know how to use AI, you can learn this quickly.



Research and Business Development

Research political candidates, opponents, and markets — backgrounds, key issues, online presence, and campaign activity. Build prospect lists, monitor candidate announcements, and help identify where we should be growing.



Digital Advertising

Learn our digital advertising platform and help coordinate campaigns across social, streaming, and programmatic channels.



CRM and Workflow Automation

Manage and maintain our Zoho CRM — data cleanup, imports, and automated workflows. Experience with any major CRM is helpful; Zoho can be learned on the job.



Data Analytics

Work with large databases—filtering, sorting, analyzing, and exporting datasets to support client campaigns. Training on our specific platforms is provided.



Operations and Administration Management

Maintain a master task list for all active projects, handle invoicing and billing, supervise a small staff, and keep Google Workspace (Drive, Docs, and Sheets) organized.



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF

You follow AI news and new tool releases on your own time — genuinely.

You like figuring things out on your own.

You keep things organized without being reminded.

You’re interested in U.S. politics or willing to learn about it.

You want to build skills in AI, marketing, and operations that will serve you for years.



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF

You need a predictable, rigid schedule.

You prefer to wait for direction rather than take initiative.

You’re not genuinely curious about AI and new technologies.



COMPENSATION

$6–$7 USD per hour, depending on experience

30–40 hours per week

Hours increase during peak election months

Profit split at the end of each election cycle — in strong years, this has been a life-changing bonus

Professional AI tool subscriptions provided



QUALIFICATIONS

Excellent English, spoken and written

Demonstrated experience with AI tools used in real work — you’ve gone beyond basic prompting and actually organized, customized, or built something with AI

Data analytics experience — comfortable filtering, sorting, and working with large data sets

Strong Google Sheets, Docs, and Drive skills; full Google Workspace experience a plus

CRM and SEO experience helpful but not required

Available approximately 2–11 AM Philippine Time

Able to commit through November 2026, with the possibility to continue



RECENT GRADUATES WELCOME. Demonstrated AI curiosity and strong English matter more than years of experience.



ABOUT PRECISION POLITICS

American based Democratic political strategy and advertising firm. 400-plus campaign wins. 94% win rate. 24 National POLLIE Awards. You’ll work directly with the firm’s owner, a nationally recognized strategist and former Chief of Staff to a U.S. mayor.



HOW TO APPLY

Begin your subject line with the word OPERATIONS — this confirms that you read the posting and can follow directions.



ATTACH YOUR RESUME AND INCLUDE A COVER LETTER:

Why does this role interest you?

Why are you qualified for this position?

What relevant experience do you have from jobs, education, or independent projects?

Which AI tools do you use, and what have you built or organized with them?

What is the most recent AI feature or tool you discovered on your own?

Can you work between 2–11 AM Philippine Time on a regular basis?



FINALISTS WILL BE ASKED TO COMPLETE A SKILLS TEST.

English writing and editing

AI prompting and data extraction

Google Sheets and data cleaning

Research tasks

CRM workflow scenario

title: Cold Caller for NY Web Design Agency (Pre-Vetted Leads / High Bonus)
description:
About Us



We're a web design agency based in New York that builds websites exclusively for contractors — HVAC, plumbers, electricians, roofers, and similar trades. Business is growing and we need a reliable phone rep to help us reach more contractors across the US.



What This Job Is



You'll be calling contractors from a list we provide, asking them 2–3 simple questions, and getting their permission to receive a short video preview of what their website could look like. That's the whole job.

You are NOT selling anything on the call. You are NOT explaining pricing. You are NOT closing deals. The owner handles all of that. Your only goal is to get the contractor to say "yes, send me the video" and collect their
.



Your Daily Tasks



Make outbound calls through GoHighLevel (GHL) — our CRM and calling platform

Call contractors from our pre-built list inside GHL

Follow a short script we provide and train you on

Ask whether they have a website and get their
 if interested

Disposition every call correctly in GHL after hanging up

Send a brief end-of-day summary of your results





Requirements



Clear, confident spoken English — this is the single most important requirement for this role

Experience with cold calling or phone outreach preferred

Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) is a plus — if you have it, mention it

Quiet workspace and reliable internet connection

Available to work 9am–1pm US Eastern Time, Monday–Friday. This is a night shift role for Philippines-based applicants — please only apply if this schedule works for you.

Comfortable making 80–150 calls per day

Self-managed and honest about your daily numbers





Compensation



$4–$6 per hour depending on experience

$5 bonus every time a contractor views the video we send

$50 bonus every time a contractor signs up as a client

Bonuses paid weekly with your base pay





How to Apply



1. Go to Vocaroo.com

2. Record a 30–60 second voice memo introducing yourself and describing any phone or sales experience you have

3. Copy the Vocaroo link

4. Send it in your message when you apply



Start your message with the words "New York Caller" so I know you read the full listing. Applications without a Vocaroo link or without those words will not be reviewed.



What We're Looking For Beyond the Basics



Honesty over hype — if you had a slow day, just tell us. We'd rather know than not know

Consistency — 100 solid calls a day beats 200 rushed ones

Coachability — we give feedback regularly and expect it to be applied

A long-term mindset — if this works for both of us, there's room to grow





We're easy to work with, we pay on time, and we give you everything you need to succeed. If you're a strong communicator who can follow a script and stay consistent, this is a good fit. Also, the owner is Filipino-American (mabuhay!).

Looking forward to hearing your voice.

title: Remote Graphic Designer - Decorated Apparel
description:
We're a decorated apparel shop in El Paso, Texas, with 15 years in business and a serious creative focus- screen printing, embroidery, DTF, and large-format work. We serve collegiate institutions, professional sports organizations, and regional businesses- work that has to be right every time. We're looking for a skilled remote designer who knows the print world, not just software.



What you'll be doing:

- Building customer mockups for approval (apparel, hats, merch)

- Separating artwork for screen printing (spot color, simulated process, halftone)

- Prepping transparent PNG files for DTF printing

- Using halftone techniques to knock out and reduce colors

- Staying on top of jobs, tasks, and approvals through Printavo- our shop management software (training provided)

- Communicating clearly and responding fast- this is a production environment



Software:

Preferred- CorelDRAW

Required- Adobe Illustrator

Required- Adobe Photoshop

Required- Printavo



Good to have:

Plus- English fluency

Plus- Spanish (any level)

Plus- Apparel industry background



Hours & Availability:

This is a full-time remote position. You must be available and responsive during our business hours- 8 AM to 5 PM Mountain Standard Time (MST), Monday through Friday. We need someone who's essentially on-call during those hours- ready to turn around files, respond to questions, and keep jobs moving. If you go dark during the workday, this won't work.



Communication:

Primary communication is through Google Chat and WhatsApp. Fast, clear responses are non-negotiable.



How to apply:

Send us samples of print production work- separations, DTF files, and mockups. Tell us which software you use and how long you've been doing this. Pay is negotiable based on your experience and skill level.



If you're using AI to apply, at least make it sound like you. We want to hear your voice, not ChatGPT's. It's ok if your English isn't 100% perfect.

title: Sales Representative
description:
About Us

Web Dynamics International is a fast-growing full-service digital marketing agency serving over 1,000 clients across four countries, the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, and Australia. We help small and medium-sized businesses build their online presence through social media management, paid advertising, and lead generation.

Founded in 2017, we started with door-to-door sales in Phoenix, Arizona and grew into an international agency with a team of 50+ employees. We are a company built on integrity, communication, and delivering a WOW customer experience to every client we work with.

We are expanding our sales team and are looking for driven, disciplined, and hungry sales representatives to join us full-time.



What You'll Be Doing

As a Sales Representative at Web Dynamics, you will be responsible for contacting inbound leads, running discovery calls, recommending the right package, closing deals, and managing your pipeline through our CRM system.

This is a high-volume outbound calling role. Leads are generated through our paid advertising campaigns, you are NOT cold calling strangers. You are calling people who have already expressed interest in our services.

Your daily responsibilities will include:



Contacting inbound leads through our dialer system

Running discovery to understand the prospect's business and needs

Recommending and presenting the right social media management package

Handling objections and closing deals on the call

Following up consistently with leads in your pipeline

Updating the CRM accurately after every call (notes, dispositions, opportunity value, tags)

Ensuring proper handoff to the onboarding team after every sale

Hitting a minimum of 300 calls per day

Working toward a goal of 50 sales per month or $5,000 in monthly revenue



What We're Looking For

We are not looking for order-takers. We are looking for closers  people who are hungry, disciplined, and don't take no for an answer easily.

You are a great fit if you:

Have a strong command of English (spoken and written)  this is non-negotiable as you will be speaking with US, Canadian, Australian, and UK business owners

Are comfortable making high volumes of outbound calls every day

Are coachable and willing to follow a proven sales process

Are self-motivated and don't need someone standing over your shoulder

Have a competitive mindset and are driven by results and commission

Can handle rejection without getting discouraged

Are organized and disciplined with CRM updates and follow-up

Have a quiet, professional workspace with a reliable internet connection

Have a working computer/laptop and headset



Preferred Experience & Skills

Previous sales experience (phone sales preferred)

Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM is a big plus

Familiarity with 
 for team communication

Experience working with a US-based company or US clients

Digital marketing or social media knowledge is a plus but not required



What We Offer



Commission on every sale you close  the more you sell, the more you make

Full training provided through our comprehensive sales training portal

A structured, proven sales process with scripts and systems in place

A high-energy team environment with clear performance expectations

Room to grow within a fast-expanding international agency

Consistent leads  you will never have to prospect or cold call



Performance Expectations

We want to be upfront about what is expected here so there are no surprises:

Minimum 300 calls per day

Maximum 3-minute wrap time between calls

50 sales per month or $5,000 in monthly revenue is the baseline target

You are expected to be profitable within your first 30 days

Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly

CRM must be updated accurately after every single call

This is a performance-based role. If you show up, follow the process, and put in the work  you will make money. If you are looking for a relaxed job where you can coast, this is not the right fit.



Requirements

Stable, high-speed internet connection (wired preferred)

Quiet, professional workspace with no background noise

Working computer/laptop

Quality headset for calls

Smartphone or ability to use 
 for team communication

Must be available Monday – Friday 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Arizona Time (MST)  no exceptions

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About AXIS Media Group



AXIS Media Group is an Australian-based digital marketing and media agency. We produce high-quality creative assets for our clients across social media, advertising, branding, and digital campaigns. Design is central to everything we do — it shapes how our clients’ brands are perceived, and we take that seriously.



We are looking for a skilled freelance Graphic Designer based in the Philippines who can work with us on an ongoing basis. If you are someone who lives and breathes design, knows Adobe Photoshop inside out, and can produce polished, professional work consistently, we want to hear from you.



The Role



As a freelance Graphic Designer for AXIS Media Group, you will be creating a range of visual assets for client campaigns, social media, advertising, and brand projects. You will receive briefs through ClickUp, communicate with the team via Slack, and use Claude as an AI assistant to support your workflow where relevant. Your work will represent our clients publicly, so quality, consistency, and attention to detail are non-negotiable.



Software Requirements



You must have your own licensed access to the full Adobe Creative Suite, including Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, and Premiere Pro. This is a hard requirement — not optional. We do not provide software licences for freelance positions.



• Adobe Photoshop — expert level (primary tool for this role)

• Adobe Illustrator — strong proficiency for vector work and logos

• Adobe InDesign — for layouts, decks, and multi-page documents

• Adobe Premiere Pro or After Effects — advantageous for motion/video assets

• Canva — for collaboration and quick assets.

• ClickUp — for receiving project briefs, managing tasks, and tracking deliverables

• Slack — for day-to-day communication with the AXIS team

• Claude — AI assistant used to support workflow, research, and brief interpretation



Key Responsibilities



• Design social media graphics, ad creatives, banners, and digital assets to brief

• Produce brand-consistent visuals across multiple client accounts with varying style guides

• Retouch and manipulate photography and imagery to a high professional standard in Photoshop

• Create print-ready and web-ready files in the correct formats and resolutions

• Design marketing collateral including flyers, brochures, presentations, and one-pagers

• Receive and interpret creative briefs through ClickUp and deliver to agreed timelines

• Communicate proactively via Slack — flag questions early, provide progress updates, and meet deadlines

• Incorporate feedback promptly and professionally without compromising quality

• Maintain well-organised, clearly labelled file structures for handoff and archiving

• Use Claude as an assistant tool to support brief interpretation, copy suggestions, and ideation where relevant



Skills & Requirements



Essential:

• Expert-level Adobe Photoshop skills — this is the core tool for this role

• Own licensed access to the full Adobe Creative Suite

• Strong graphic design fundamentals: typography, colour theory, layout, and composition

• Experience designing for digital platforms (social media, digital ads, web)

• A sharp eye for detail — you notice the small things that make design look polished

• Ability to work across multiple brand styles and adapt your aesthetic to suit each client

• Organised and reliable — you meet deadlines and communicate clearly when you cannot

• Comfortable working in English — reading briefs, communicating with the team, and understanding feedback

• Comfortable using ClickUp for task management and Slack for communication

• Willing to use Claude as a workflow assistant where prompted



Advantageous (not required but a bonus):

• Experience with motion graphics or video editing (After Effects or Premiere Pro)

• UI/UX or web design experience

• Experience working with Australian brands or agencies

• Social media content design experience (Reels covers, Stories, carousel posts, etc.)

• Brand identity and logo design experience



Who We Are Looking For



We want a designer who takes genuine pride in their craft. Someone who understands that a well-executed design is more than just visual — it communicates, persuades, and builds trust. If you find yourself noticing kerning issues on signs or instinctively reaching for Photoshop to fix a poorly cropped image, you’re our kind of person.

This is a freelance position, so you will need to be self-directed and reliable. We are not looking for someone who needs to be chased for updates. We want a professional who manages their own workload, communicates proactively, and consistently delivers work that makes our clients look great.



How to Apply



To be considered, please include the following in your application:

• Msg via W h a t s a p p (
)

• Your updated resume

• A portfolio of your design work — links to examples or a PDF showcase (required)

• Confirmation that you have licensed access to the full Adobe Creative Suite

• A brief note (3–5 sentences) on your design background and why you’re a great fit for this role

• Your availability and typical turnaround times

title: Video Editor (DaVinci Resolve Specialist)
description:
About AXIS Media Group



AXIS Media Group is an Australian digital marketing and media production agency. We create high-quality content for a range of clients — from social media campaigns and brand videos to long-form content and digital advertising. We are a team that cares about the craft, not just the output. Every frame matters to us, and we want a Video Editor who feels the same way.

We are looking for a talented and dedicated Video Editor based in the Philippines to join our remote team on a full-time basis. This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow alongside a creative agency and become a genuine part of the team.



The Role



As our Video Editor, you will work on a variety of content projects — social media short-form clips, brand videos, testimonials, ad creatives, and more. Your primary tool is DaVinci Resolve, and you need to know it deeply: colour grading, audio mixing, multi-cam editing, transitions, text animations, and exports. You will collaborate closely with our Australian team, attend regular video check-ins, and bring a strong sense of visual storytelling to everything you produce.



What We Provide



We set our editors up for success. You will receive access to Higgsfield AI for enhanced video production, free mentoring calls with senior tea
mbers, ready-to-use assets and templates, and ongoing support to develop your skills. We invest in the people we work with.



• Access to Higgsfield AI — provided by AXIS for your productions

• Regular one-on-one and group mentoring calls at no cost to you

• Pre-built asset libraries, templates, and motion resources

• Clear briefs and a structured workflow so you always know what is expected

• A collaborative, feedback-driven team environment where your craft is respected



Key Responsibilities



• Edit short-form and long-form video content to a high professional standard using DaVinci Resolve

• Colour grade footage to match brand look and feel, or as directed

• Mix and clean audio tracks including voiceover, music, and ambient sound

• Create and apply motion graphics, text animations, and lower thirds within DaVinci Resolve

• Export and deliver files to the correct specs for each platform (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, web, etc.)

• Attend virtual tea
etings on Mondays and Wednesdays, with availability for Friday check-ins as required

• Collaborate via Slack for day-to-day communication and updates

• Manage and organise project files within Google Drive and ClickUp

• Use Claude (AI assistant) as directed to support workflows and efficiency

• Take creative direction, incorporate feedback, and revise work in a timely manner

• Maintain consistent output quality across multiple concurrent projects



Skills & Requirements



Essential:

• Minimum 2–3 years of professional video editing experience

• Expert-level proficiency in DaVinci Resolve — you must hold the paid (Studio) version

• Strong understanding of colour grading, audio mixing, and post-production workflow

• A genuine passion for the craft of editing — you understand pacing, storytelling, and visual rhythm

• Full-time availability — you are dedicated to this role and not juggling multiple full-time commitments

• Reliable internet connection and a capable editing workstation

• Comfortable working in English — written and spoken communication with the Australian team

• Familiarity with ClickUp for task and project management

• Familiarity with Slack for team communication

• Working knowledge of Google Drive for file storage and sharing

• Basic familiarity with Claude (AI assistant) or willingness to learn



Advantageous (not required but a bonus):

• Experience with Higgsfield AI or similar AI-assisted video tools

• Motion graphics experience in Fusion (built into DaVinci Resolve)

• Experience editing for Australian or Western-market brands

• Photography or cinematography background

• Short-form social media content editing experience (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)



Team Structure & Meetings



You will work closely with the AXIS team and be a genuine part of our production workflow. We run structured team check-ins twice a week on Mondays and Wednesdays, with an optional third session on Fridays when project load requires it. These are short, focused meetings — not lengthy sit-ins. We use these to align on priorities, share feedback, and keep projects moving.

Outside of meetings, the team communicates through Slack. We expect you to be responsive during working hours, take creative feedback constructively, and flag any issues early. We are a collaborative team that respects each other’s time and expertise.



Pay Structure



Editing projects are paid at a rate of AUD $30–$80 per video, based on the complexity, length, and requirements of each edit. More involved projects requiring colour grading, motion graphics, and multi-track audio are compensated at the higher end of the range. Clear briefs will always outline the expected scope before work begins.

We value quality over speed, and we price accordingly. If you are the right fit and your work consistently delivers, there is real potential for long-term, ongoing work with increasing volume.



Who We Are Looking For



We are not looking for a button-pusher. We want someone who loves editing — who thinks about why a cut works, who cares about how audio feels, and who sees the difference between a mediocre video and a great one. If you have been editing for years and still feel excited when a project comes together, you are the kind of person we want.

You need to be reliable, self-managed, and comfortable working asynchronously with an Australian team. You take feedback well, communicate clearly, and approach your work with professionalism and pride.



How to Apply



To be considered, please include the following in your application:

• Please D
 on WhatsApp 
• Your updated resume

• A showreel or portfolio of video work — links to edited videos you have produced (required)

• Confirmation that you use DaVinci Resolve Studio (paid version)

• A brief note (3–5 sentences) on your editing background and why this role interests you

• Your typical working hours and availability



Applications without a portfolio or showreel will not be considered.



We look forward to seeing your work.



— The AXIS Media Group Team

Calling U.S. business prospects daily.

Turning "No" and "Send me an
" into "Yes" and "Let’s meet."

Qualifying leads and managing your pipeline in GHL.

Success Metric: Number of confirmed meetings on the calendar.



Who We Are Looking For

You don't just "make calls"—you book meetings.

You have a thick skin and professional persistence.

You are an expert at navigating the U.S. B2B landscape.

Must have GHL experience.



How to Apply

Voice Recording: 1–2 mins (Intro + Roleplay call).

Mandatory Statement: “I have B2B appointment setting experience and GHL experience.”

Experience: Send a summary of your B2B background and GHL proficiency.



Variant 3: Lead Generation Associate

Lead Generation Associate (B2B Sales) | Earn up to ?80K+/Month

TruGuard Security is looking for a high-caliber Lead Generation Associate to manage outbound outreach for our U.S.-based sales operations.



Compensation Package

Base: $4.5 - $6 /hr (based on experience)

Incentives: Uncapped commission for every meeting booked.

Top Performance: Consistent earners hit ?50,000 – ?80,000+.



Key Responsibilities

Cold calling U.S. decision-makers to generate interest.

Using Go High Level (GHL) to track outreach and appointments.

Building a rapport quickly and closing for the discovery call.

Handling gatekeepers and administrative "brush-offs" with ease.



Strict Qualifications

Direct experience in B2B Lead Generation/Appointment Setting.

History of calling the U.S. market.

Excellent English (neutral or U.S. accent preferred).

Ability to maintain high energy during U.S. business shifts.



How to Apply

Voice Recording: (1–2 minutes) Proving your tone and pitching ability.

Required Line: “I have B2B appointment setting experience and GHL experience.”

Submission: Details on your past U.S. cold calling metrics and GHL usage.



Final Note for all roles: These are performance-based positions for those who want to be paid what they are worth. If you are not comfortable with cold calling or high-performance targets, these roles will not be a fit.

title: Business Development Representative (BDR)
description:
High-Caliber BDR | U.S. Security Firm | Earn ?50K–?80K+ Monthly



TruGuard Security is seeking elite Business Development Representatives from the Philippines to fuel our U.S. expansion.

This is a high-stakes outbound prospecting role for sales professionals—not a virtual assistant position.



Compensation (Target Earnings)

Base Salary: ($4.5–$6/hour based on experience)

+ Uncapped Commissions + Performance Bonuses



While the average rep earns ?30K–?45K, our high-caliber BDRs consistently reach ?50K–?80K+ through our aggressive commission structure.



The Mission

Execute high-volume outbound cold calls to U.S. businesses.

Strategically bypass gatekeepers to reach CEOs and Owners.

Pitch our value proposition and handle complex objections.

Primary Goal: Secure qualified appointments for our sales team.



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

Proven B2B Appointment Setting or BDR experience.

Extensive experience cold calling the U.S. Market.

Mastery of Go High Level (GHL).

Fluent, persuasive English communication skills.

Stable internet, quiet environment, and ability to work U.S. hours.



How to Apply

Voice Recording (MANDATORY): 1–2 mins introducing yourself + a mock cold call close.

Required Line: “I have B2B appointment setting experience and GHL experience.”



Metrics: Include your average daily calls and booking rates.

title: Operations & Executive Assistant (Asana, HubSpot, WordPress, AI Tools)
description:
We are hiring a reliable, organized, and tech-comfortable assistant to support daily operations across multiple projects and clients.



This is a long-term role for someone who can follow systems, stay organized, and take ownership of their work.



*****RESPONSIBILITIES*****



**Operations & Project Management**



- Set up and manage projects in Asana using templates

- Assign tasks, due dates, and collaborators

- Track progress and follow up on overdue tasks



**Client & Tech Support**



- Manage incoming requests (forms,
, tickets)

- Follow SOPs to assist with basic troubleshooting

- Escalate issues when needed



**CRM (HubSpot)**



- Add and update contacts

- Track deals, notes, and meetings

- Keep CRM clean and organized



**Website Updates (WordPress)**



- Edit pages, blogs, images, and text

- Follow instructions for updates



**Admin & Communication**



- Confir
etings and send reminders

- Answer or route occasional calls

- Communicate clearly with team and clients



**AI Tools**



- Use ChatGPT, Zapier and Claude to assist with SOPs, messages, and tasks



*****REQUIREMENTS*****



- Strong written and verbal English

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Comfortable with technology

- Self starter and can identity issues and provide solutions when needed

- Works quickly and efficiently

- Reliable and available during required hours



*****WORK HOURS*****



Monday - Friday: 8:00 AM ET - 3:00 PM ET paid the 1st and 15th of the month.



(more hours available as needed)



*****IMPORTANT!***** 



When applying please include a link to a 3-5 minute video of yourself sharing about who you are, your expertise and how you feel you can best support this role.

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat!
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree

title: AI Marketing Affiliate
description:
We are an AI marketing agency creating short-form content for Instagram and
.



We are looking for an AI Video Creator who can take pre-written scripts and turn them into high-quality AI-generated videos using advanced tools.



This is a visual production role



???? What You’ll Do

Create 6–10 short-form videos daily (60–120 seconds each)

Turn provided scripts into fully visual AI videos

Generate:

Background scenes

AI avatars

Visual elements that match the script

Use prompting to bring each video to life

Deliver consistent, clean, engaging outputs daily

????? Required Tools & Skills



You MUST be experienced with:

Google Veo 3 * 

HeyGen

Core Skill:



???? Strong ability to prompt AI tools to generate visuals, including:



Realistic environments

Smooth, engaging video scenes

???? What We’re Looking For

Experience creating short-form videos (Reels/TikTok style)

Ability to produce 5–10 videos daily

Strong attention to detail (visual quality + consistency)

Good English understanding (to follow scripts accurately)

Fast, reliable, and able to meet daily output



???? Compensation

Monthly salary: $450 

Fixed pay

???? How to Apply



Please include:



Short introduction

Your experience with Higgsfield, Veo 3, and HeyGen

Examples of AI videos you’ve created



Please note hours fluctuate, this role is focused on hitting the desired number of videos with quality, not the hours

title: Full Time Remote Customer Support Assistant
description:
We are building a distributed support team and are looking for a Customer Support Assistant who takes written communication seriously and values consistency in their work. This is a full-time remote position designed for someone who wants dependable income, clear expectations, and the chance to grow within a structured environment over time.



This role is not project-based or temporary. We are looking for someone who wants stability, is comfortable working set hours, and understands that strong support is built on reliability and attention to detail.



You will spend your workday handling customer conversations through written messages. Your responsibility is to provide clear, accurate, and professional responses while maintaining a friendly tone. You will work within defined guidelines, manage several conversations at the same time, and ensure users receive timely and helpful replies. Part of the role also involves flagging recurring issues, technical problems, or useful feedback so the team can improve processes and systems.

Full onboarding and training are provided before you begin working independently.



This role requires strong written English and a typing speed of at least 60 words per minute. You must have a reliable internet connection of 50-100 Mbps or higher. A dependable laptop or desktop computer with at least 8 GB of RAM is required.



You should be available full-time for a consistent schedule of eight hours per day, six days per week. We value people who are detail-oriented, professional in their communication, dependable in meeting expectations, and open to feedback and improvement.



Previous experience in customer support, chat-based roles, or remote work is helpful but not required.



The hourly pay for this position ranges from 4 to 6 USD, depending on experience and performance.

In addition to base pay, there are performance-based bonuses, regular reviews, and opportunities for raises. Team members who consistently perform well can grow into higher-responsibility and higher-paying roles over time.



Why Join Us?

You’ll be working remotely in a structured environment with clear systems, training, and expectations. This role is ideal for someone who wants long-term stability rather than short-term gigs, and who values growth through consistent performance.



Apply now by sending us a message with all relevant information mentioned above and we look forward to having you!

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Job description:



If you are seeking an SDR role that:



Offers you to go beyond simply setting up robotic
 sequences

Allows you to bring ideas and be part of the team that is solving prospecting challenges

Offers opportunities to make a significant impact on the growth of companies across different industries

Provides challenging yet rewarding experiences

Provides exposure to diverse countries/cultures

Offers you to work with a collaborative, supportive and caring team

Then look no further, you will love working with us!



About EXPAND IN ASIA



Expand In Asia specialises in helping B2B companies grow their sales pipeline. We do that by offering state of the art B2B outbound prospecting services. We focus on the early stages of a sales cycle to significantly expand our clients’ top of the funnel. We believe that expanding our clients’ business requires in-depth knowledge about their business and their prospects. Our clients outsource to us their SDR (Sales Development Representative) activities. The aim is to function as an extension of our clients.



We operate under the following values: Passion to create value for our customers, Resilience to achieve results and Lead with compassion in everything that we do.



What you will do



Day-to-day responsibilities include prospecting, qualifying leads, setting appointments with qualified prospects.

Craft, execute and improve a variety of outbound sales prospecting campaigns using cold calling, LinkedIn and
.

Demonstrate capacity to navigate complex organisational structures to connect with the appropriate decision-makers.

Develop and execute outbound prospecting campaigns through innovative approaches.

Help define the go-to-market strategy and territory planning customised to different countries.

Work with contact research teams to build the pipeline of contacts to engage.

Monitor and optimise campaign performance against key metrics

Deliver persuasive post-campaign presentations to clients

What you bring



4-5 years of proven B2B SDR Experience,

B2B outbound
 and LinkedIn campaign management, market research analysis.

Has a strong cold calling background, with experience reaching out to prospects, and booking meetings.

Communication Skills: Strong verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to engage and influence stakeholders at all levels.

Learning abilities: Quickly adaptable to new processes and digital tools with the will to improve processes

Personal attributes: Entrepreneurial, strategic, empathic, resilient, digitally savvy, and a results-driven self-starter.

Work From home Set- up: Reliable internet, connection, back up for power interruptions, Recent computer specs and a conducive work environment free from any disturbances

Prospecting (SDR) to Enterprise businesses is needed

Job Type: Full-time



Benefits:





Work from home

Application Question(s):





Please share your LinkedIn profile

Which of the following have you personally handled? (Select all that apply)

Cold calling and booking meetings





Managing outbound
 campaigns





LinkedIn prospecting and outreach





Market research and lead qualification





Campaign performance tracking and reporting





Do you have a reliable work-from-home setup (stable internet, backup power, updated computer, and distraction-free workspace)?

Experience:





SDR: 4 years (Required)

Work Location: Remote

title: Business Development Manager (SDR Manager) – Enterprise Focus (WFH)
description:
We are not looking for an average SDR Manager.

We are looking for someone who can build, lead, and scale a high-performing outbound team targeting enterprise clients.

If you’ve successfully led SDR teams, understand how to break into complex organizations, and know how to consistently generate high-quality pipeline from enterprise accounts — this role is for you.

________________________________________

What You’ll Own

• Lead and scale a team of SDRs focused on enterprise prospecting and pipeline generation 

• Build and optimize outbound strategies across cold calling, LinkedIn, and
 

• Drive consistent generation of qualified meetings with enterprise decision-makers (VP to C-level) 

• Coach SDRs on navigating multi-threaded enterprise sales cycles 

• Improve conversion rates across the funnel (contact ? conversation ? meeting ? pipeline) 

• Develop messaging that resonates with enterprise pain points and buying triggers 

• Own SDR KPIs: pipeline generated, meeting quality, conversion rates, and activity performance 

• Analyze performance data and continuously optimize team output 

• Build a repeatable and scalable outbound playbook 

• Managing and communicating with clients (presenting result, defining and revisiting/readjusting prospecting strategy)

________________________________________

What Makes You a Strong Fit

• 5–8+ years in B2B outbound sales, with 2–3+ years leading SDR/BDR teams 

• Proven success in generating pipeline from enterprise accounts 

• Strong experience in cold calling, LinkedIn outreach, and outbound
 campaigns 

• Ability to engage senior stakeholders (Directors, VPs, C-suite) 

• Experience navigating complex organizations and long sales cycles 

• Data-driven — you understand metrics and know how to improve them 

• Strong coaching ability — you can turn average SDRs into top performers 

• Highly strategic, execution-focused, and results-driven 

________________________________________

What We Value

• Ownership mindset — you take responsibility for results 

• Speed and adaptability — you move and improve fast

• High standards — you don’t settle for average performance 

• Resilience — you do not easily give up and always look for ways to make things work

________________________________________

Work Setup (Remote)

• Stable high-speed internet 

• Backup for power and connectivity 

• Updated laptop/desktop 

• Distraction-free workspace 

________________________________________

Why Join Us

• Opportunity to build and shape a high-impact SDR team 

• Work directly with leadership and influence revenue growth 

• Fully remote environment with a performance-driven culture 

• High visibility role with strong career growth potential

title: Senior Customer Service Rep - Remote Role
description:
At Red Water Holdings, we craft high-quality supplements and cosmetics that help people look, feel, and perform better. Since our launch we are quickly becoming one of the fastest growing brands in our niche. We scale through Meta ads 
/Instagram) across DTC and marketplaces and with our growing customer base, we are making sure to keep customer satisfaction at an all time high. 



We are looking for an A-player Senior Customer Service agent to take full ownership of our CS department and help us scale to the next level. This is a high-responsibility, high-autonomy role reporting directly to the founders.



Your Mission:



Own the customer service function end-to-end, ensuring our customers receive world-class support while driving key KPIs like response time and retention. Not only will we need you to be on top of your game and efficiently respond to tickets, we will also need you to keep an open mind on ways to innovate and improve our customer service systems. 



Responsibilities:



- Handle customer inquiries across
 and chat with speed, accuracy, and full ownership from first contact to resolution

- Manage order issues, refunds, returns, subscription changes, and product questions

- Use AI tools to assist with response drafting and ticket management, while reviewing all outputs before they reach a customer

- Identify patterns in customer issues and proactively flag them to the team

- Suggest improvements to AI prompts, response templates, and support workflows based on real interactions

- Maintain accurate records and follow SOPs consistently

- Escalate issues when necessary with clear, complete documentation — no half-baked handoffs

- Contribute ideas to improve the overall customer experience, not just close tickets



Our Tech Stack:



- Shopify

- Checkout Champ (subscriptions)

- 
 and WhatsApp for team comms



KPIs You Will Own:



- First Response Time: Under 24 hours

- Oldest Ticket: Under 1 day

- Chargeback thresholds within the acceptable range



What We're Looking For:



- Highly responsible — you do what you say you're going to do

- Sharp attention to detail with zero tolerance for sloppy work

- Self-sufficient and solutions-oriented — you figure it out

- Comfortable using AI tools and curious about how to make them better

- Clear, professional written communicator

- Calm under pressure and consistent in quality

- No ego — just results



Why Join Us:



- Fast-moving, no-bureaucracy environment where your work actually matters

- Real ownership of your role — we trust you to run it

- Work alongside AI tools at the forefront of how customer service is evolving

- Your ideas get heard and implemented, not buried in a suggestion box

- Remote, flexible, and built for people who deliver without being micromanaged

- Grow with a company that's scaling fast 



This Role Is Not For You If:



- You need constant supervision to stay on track

- Closing a ticket matters more to you than actually solving the problem

- You do the bare minimum and call it done

- Details slip through the cracks and you're okay with that

- You treat SOPs as suggestions

- You're not genuinely curious about AI and how to use it better

- You shut down under pressure instead of pushing through



Compensation & Details:



- $1,000+/month USD salary, depending on experience.

- Full-time, remote. Primary employment (no other jobs).



How to Apply:



If you're someone who takes full ownership, sweats the details, and genuinely takes pride in doing things right — we want to hear from you. This isn't a role for someone looking to punch the clock. This is for someone who sees a problem and fixes it, every single time.



To stand out, direct message me (Robert) a loom of you answering all the questions below.



QUESTIONS:



Q: How long have you been in a customer service role and what types of businesses or products have you supported?



Q: Describe a time you identified a recurring customer issue and took steps to fix it beyond just resolving the individual ticket.



Q: What AI tools have you used in a customer service context, and how did you use them to improve your workflow or output quality?



Q: A customer is threatening a chargeback over an issue that wasn't the company's fault. Walk me through exactly how you handle it.



Q: Describe a time you had to manage a high volume of tickets without letting quality slip. What did you do to stay on top of it?



Add any relevant work samples, SOPs you've built, or references (optional but recommended)

title: DROPSHIPPING EXPERT (AUTOMOTIVE PRODUCTS KNOWLEDGE IS PREFERRED)
description:
We are looking for a highly experienced Dropshipping Expert who understands the full dropshipping process — from sourcing winning products to validating and scaling them.



This role is focused on finding profitable, sellable products, especially in the automotive category (preferred), and ensuring they can perform in the market before launch.



Key Responsibilities

• Identify and source winning products from different suppliers:  direct suppliers, alibaba, aliexpress, and more.

• Analyze product demand, competition, and profitability 

• Validate products before launch (market research, competitor analysis, pricing strategy) 

• Ensure strong margins, reliable suppliers, and fast shipping options

• Strong understanding of product validation and market demand

Performance Expectations

• Consistently find profitable and scalable products 

• Validate products before launch to reduce risk 

• Maintain strong supplier relationships 

• Improve product success rate and overall store performance

title: Accessibility Specialist (Documents / PDFs)
description:
This role requires advanced accessibility expertise and attention to detail, rather than general graphic design capability

alone. The specialist supports the remediation and production of complex documentation to meet WCAG 2.2 AA and PDF accessibility standards, ensuring outputs are compliant, usable, and fit for purpose.



Key Responsibilities

• Produce high-end, accurate finished art across complex, long-form financial services documentation.

• Create accessible interactive form PDFs using Adobe InDesign and Acrobat.

• Remediate existing documents to meet WCAG 2.2 AA and PDF accessibility standards.

• Apply and validate correct tagging, reading order, alt text, structure, and logical document flow.

• Conduct screen reader testing and accessibility validation.

• Ensure all documents meet compliance requirements within regulated environments.

• Liaise with IVE stakeholders to clarify briefs and accessibility requirements.

• Maintain exceptional attention to detail and technical accuracy.



Essential Skills & Experience

• Experience working within corporate brand guidelines and compliance frameworks.

• Advanced Adobe InDesign skills — complex layouts, long-form documents, print and digital production.

• Proven experience creating accessible interactive PDFs in InDesign and Acrobat.

• Strong working knowledge of WCAG 2.2 AA and PDF accessibility standards.

• Demonstrated experience remediating documents for accessibility compliance.

• Confident conducting screen reader testing and validating tagging, reading order, alt text and document structure.

• Experience working with regulated or financial services documentation highly regarded.



Accreditations & Desirable Skills

• Accessibility accreditations or formal accessibility certifications.

• Familiarity with Common Look PDF or other remediation tools.

• Proficiency in Microsoft Word and PowerPoint for document formatting.



***Work from home ready

***Amenable to work around 6AM-3PM //7 AM-4PM MNL time

***Comfortable using time tracker (time doctor app)



Interested applicants may send their most updated CV and portfolio. Apply now!

title: PIXEL & TRACKING SPECIALIST (Project-Based / Part-Time)
description:
PIXEL & TRACKING SPECIALIST (Project-Based / Part-Time)

We’re hiring a Pixel & Tracking Specialist who is obsessed with data integrity and attribution. This is a project-based role designed for the technical wizard who ensures that every click, lead, and conversion is tracked accurately across our entire marketing ecosystem.

If you understand that "you can’t scale what you can’t measure," then you are our person. You are here to bridge the gap between our ad platforms (Meta/Google) and our CRM (GoHighLevel), ensuring that our ROI reporting is bulletproof and our data flows seamlessly. Your priorities are attribution accuracy, server-side tracking (CAPI), and eliminating data blind spots.

—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.

--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!

What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM! 

Our Team Core Values:

DELIGHT THE CLIENT: We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

MASTER YOUR CRAFT: We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS: When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you get a dopamine hit when your "Test Events" fire perfectly in GTM? Do you have a deep understanding of browser-side vs. server-side tracking? Are you the person who finds the broken UTM parameter that everyone else missed? Do you take pride in creating clean, organized tracking environments that empower Media Buyers to scale with confidence?

Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!

Project Responsibilities:

Phase 1: Infrastructure Architecture & Audit

Perform a deep-dive audit of current Google Tag Manager (GTM) containers (Web & Server-side).

Configure/Verify Meta Pixel & Conversions API (CAPI) to achieve maximum event match quality.

Standardize GA4 configurations, including custom dimensions, lead-quality metrics, and enhanced measurement.

Phase 2: Attribution & CRM Integration

Implement a standardized UTM protocol across all channels to ensure 1:1 attribution within GoHighLevel.

Map "Deep Tracking" parameters to GHL custom fields to capture lead source, keyword, and campaign IDs.

Troubleshoot and close attribution gaps where "Direct/None" traffic is over-reporting.

Phase 3: Maintenance & Data Quality Assurance

Conduct regular "Health Checks" to ensure pixels aren't double-firing or failing due to site updates.

Resolve tracking issues caused by iOS privacy updates or browser cookie restrictions.

Build custom data visualizations (Looker Studio or GHL Dashboards) to show real-time CPL and ROAS.



Requirements:

EXPERT-level knowledge of Google Tag Manager (GTM), required.

Deep experience with Meta Conversions API (CAPI) and server-side tracking, required.

Proficiency in GA4 setup, debugging, and troubleshooting, required.

Familiarity with GoHighLevel tracking capabilities, hidden fields, and custom values, required.

Experience with Zapier or 
 for sending offline conversions or webhook data, required.

High attention to detail—you hate "dirty data" and unexplained discrepancies, required.

Strong English communication skills to explain technical "breaks" to the media buying team.

A stable, high-speed internet connection (at least 150mbps), required.

BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)

Experience with 3rd-party attribution tools (Hyros, Triple Whale, or SegMetrics).

Basic Javascript/HTML knowledge for custom tag firing.

SQL or BigQuery knowledge for advanced data analysis.

NOTE: This is a Project-Based / Part-Time role (5–15 hrs/week). We are looking for a specialist who can execute the initial infrastructure setup and provide ongoing maintenance/QA as we scale.



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1: Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.

As part of your application, include a Loom or YouTube video (2 minutes or less) explaining a complex tracking problem you solved and why you believe you’re the best fit for this role.



STEP 2: Qualified candidates may be invited to an interview.

STEP 3: Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). This will be the last step in the hiring process.

STEP 4: Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Pixel/Tracking SpecialistPIXEL & TRACKING SPECIALIST (Project-Based / Part-Time)

.

etings, mostly in Eastern Time Zone (USA), and collaborate effectively with remote tea

title: Executive & Real Estate Virtual Assistant
description:
Executive & Real Estate Virtual Assistant (Remote, Calgary Time Zone)



Type: Part-time ? Full-time

Hours: 20 hrs/week (probation), transitioning to full-time

Location: 100% Remote (must be aligned with Calgary, AB time zone)



About the Role

We’re hiring a high-performing Executive & Real Estate Virtual Assistant to support a driven real estate professional scaling toward top commercial production while managing an active residential business and growing investment portfolio.



This is a long-term, high-trust role for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, takes ownership, and operates with discretion. You’ll be involved across business operations and personal admin — bringing structure, consistency, and efficiency to everything you touch.



Key Responsibilitie:



Commercial Real Estate

-Manage CRM daily and ensure consistent follow-up

-Coordinate showings, meetings, and deal flow

-Prepare listing packages and market research

-Track deals from offer to closing

-Liaise with lawyers, lenders, and inspectors

-Maintain pipeline visibility and deadlines



Residential Real Estate

-Manage and nurture inbound leads

-Coordinate showings and listing appointments

-Prepare marketing materials and client documents

-Upload and promote listings across platforms

-Coordinate staging, photos, and open houses

-Support transactions end-to-end

-Draft client communications and updates



Portfolio Management

-Track rents, leases, and renewals

-Coordinate with tenants, trades, and property managers

-Monitor and follow up on maintenance requests

-Organize documents and reporting

-Track expenses and flag vacancies



Personal & Executive Support

-Manage calendar, scheduling, and reminders

-Book travel, reservations, and logistics

-Handle errands, research, and vendor coordination

-Draft personal correspondence as needed



Requirements

-2+ years of experience as a VA, EA, or operations support

-Real estate or property management experience preferred

-Strong CRM experience (Follow Up Boss, HubSpot, etc.)

-Excellent written communication skills

-Comfortable managing real estate transactions and timelines

-Highly organized with strong attention to detail

-Proven ability to juggle multiple priorities

-High discretion with sensitive information

-Proactive, self-directed, and solution-oriented

Nice to Have
