title: AI video editor and commercial maker
description:
About Us



We run a fast-growing camping trailer and truck topper company focused on high-end, visually appealing rigs. We’re building aggressive ad campaigns and want content that actually converts—not generic, low-effort AI videos.



What We Need



We’re looking for an AI Video Editor who can create high-quality AI avatar ads and commercial-style content, but also knows how to step in and manually refine/edit when AI falls short.



This is not a beginner role. You need to know how to make content look real, clean, and high-converting.



What You’ll Be Doing

Take raw footage of trailers, campers, and product shots ? turn into high-converting ad creatives

Create AI-generated avatars for ads (sales-style, lifestyle, demo videos)

Edit videos where the owner (me) may appear ? transform appearance, voice, or style using AI tools

Combine AI + manual editing for polished final output

Create multiple ad variations for testing (hooks, formats, angles)

Optimize content for:

 / Instagram ads

TikTok / short-form content

YouTube ads

Required Skills

Strong experience with AI video tools, such as:

Synthesia, HeyGen, Runway, Pika, etc.

Advanced editing skills in:

Adobe Premiere Pro

After Effects (preferred)

Ability to:

Create realistic AI avatars (not cheesy-looking)

Blend AI content with real footage seamlessly

Modify faces, voices, or personas when needed

Understanding of ad performance (hooks, pacing, retention)

Bonus (Highly Preferred)

Experience creating high-converting ad creatives

Background in e-commerce or product marketing

Ability to script or improve ad messaging

Motion graphics / visual effects experience

What Success Looks Like

Ads look real, clean, and high-end

AI avatars don’t feel fake or robotic

Content actually drives engagement and conversions

Fast turnaround with multiple variations

Compensation

Project-based or hourly (based on experience)

Opportunity for ongoing monthly work

Potential to grow into a long-term role as we scale ads

restrictions and eligibility

net profit

title: 24 HR Review | VA Remote Virtual Receptionist
description:
Important: Our application process moves quickly. If you are selected to proceed to the next interview stages, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist to manage inbound calls and book spa appointments. This is a long-term, performance-based position. Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement in this role depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: Senior Video Editor ( Pacific Standard Time )
description:
Application Requirements:

1. Use at least 10AP for your application.

2. Include "Senior Video Editor Pro" in your subject line.



Note: Applications missing either requirement will not be considered.

_________________________________________________________



About Veritas Vans

Veritas Vans builds the most trusted accessories for Starlink Mini and Starlink Standard. Our mission is to give people the freedom to work, explore, and stay connected anywhere. From Baja coastlines to deep forest trails, our customers rely on our gear for capability, protection, and unlimited connection.



Your role is to help visually tell this story across all platforms.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Senior Video Editor who can own our long-form YouTube content, high-retention short-form content, and graphic design needs. You must be highly experienced, creative, fast, and able to work autonomously within a growing brand.



Responsibilities



Video Editing – Long Form

- Edit 6–15 minute YouTube videos with strong retention, pacing, and narrative clarity.

- Add b-roll, overlays, captions, music, and brand-consistent graphics.

- Build engaging openings with proven YouTube hook methods.



Video Editing – Short Form

- Execute the Hook ? Retain ? Reward method for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.

- Add dynamic subtitles, zooms, cuts, 
 inserts, and pacing adjustments.

- Produce scroll-stopping, high-retention content.



Graphic Design & Photo Editing

- Create YouTube thumbnails and graphic assets.

- Design text treatments, overlays, and promotional visuals.

- Edit lifestyle and product photos for multi-platform use.



Brand Storytelling

- Align all edits with our brand themes: freedom, connection, capability, control.

- Contribute creative ideas and concepts for future video content.



AI-Driven Editing & Workflow Optimization

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, Topaz, Descript, etc.) as a core part of your editing workflow.

- Generate high-performing hooks, captions, and on-screen text callouts using AI.

- Use AI to research and improve storytelling, pacing, and content structure.

- Continuously explore and implement new AI workflows to improve output quality, speed, and efficiency.

- Leverage AI to enhance both creative output and production throughput, not just assist basic tasks.



Cross-Platform Optimization

- Edit in multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 4:5, 1:1.

- Prepare final deliverables in organized, structured folders.

- Optimize content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok,
.



Collaboration

- Work closely with the content team and leadership.

- Follow SOPs and meet deadlines consistently.

- Join scheduled calls proactively (no reminders required)

- Be punctual and prepared for feedback sessions



Work Discipline & Delivery Standards

- Be actively available and responsive during working hours (PST schedule).

- Address tasks, revisions, and team communication within working hours.

- Meet deadlines consistently and communicate early if delays occur.

- Submit deliverables early in the workday whenever possible to allow time for review and revisions.



Quality & Output Standards

- Deliver edits that are near publish-ready on first submission.

- Ensure drafts require minimal revisions and are not incomplete or partially executed.

- Perform a full self-review before submission to ensure:

- all feedback is applied

- no new issues are introduced

- output meets brand and quality standards

- Maintain consistently high production quality across all deliverables.



Note:

Include the phrase “Senior Video Editor Pro” in your subject line. Applications missing this phrase will not be considered. Use at least 5AP for your application.



Required Skills



- Ability to work graveyard shift (PST hours)

- 3–5+ years professional video editing experience

- Expert in Adobe Premiere Pro

- Strong skills in After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, or Figma

- Proven experience editing YouTube content and high-performing short-form videos

- Strong understanding of retention, pacing, story structure, and attention engineering

- Experience creating high-converting thumbnails

- Strong understanding of modern content trends across YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok

- Ability to edit lifestyle, outdoor, product, and UGC-style content



AI & Workflow Skills (Required)

- Strong proficiency in using AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, etc.) within editing workflows

- Ability to generate hooks, captions, and on-screen text using AI

- Experience using AI to improve storytelling, pacing, and video performance

- Ability to research and implement new AI workflows to improve efficiency and output quality



Work Ethic & Discipline

- Highly reliable, responsive, and accountable

- Strong attention to detail and ability to self-review work

- Ability to follow feedback precisely and minimize repeated revisions



Bonus Experience

- Motion graphics or animation skills.

- Experience in e-commerce, outdoor brands, or creator channels.

- Understanding of YouTube SEO (titles, thumbnails, keywords).

- Ability to generate ideas for hooks, storylines, and visual treatments.



What We Offer

- Long-term employment with growth potential.

- Competitive salary based on experience.

- Consistent weekly workload.

- Direct impact on a fast-scaling global brand.

- Creative freedom and an opportunity to lead our video direction.



How to Apply



Submit the following:

- Resume

- Short explanation of why you’re the right fit

- Brief explanation of how you use AI in your editing workflow

- 1 example where you improved video performance (retention, CTR, etc.)

- Portfolio of your best long-form and short-form edits

- Links to YouTube channels or brands you’ve edited for



Learn About Us:









Website:

title: Commercial Real Estate Virtual Assistant | Cold Calling, CRM,  Lead Generation, Social Media Support
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, proactive, and professional Virtual Assistant / Inside Sales Support Specialist to support a growing Commercial Real Estate advisory business based in Orlando, Florida.

This role is ideal for someone who is confident in cold calling, lead qualification, CRM management, databasing, appointment setting, and light social media support, with a strong ability to communicate professionally and support revenue-generating activities. This role is designed for someone who wants to grow into a long-term strategic support position within a growing commercial real estate advisory business.

This is not a basic admin role.

You will play a key part in helping generate business opportunities, maintaining our prospect pipeline, and supporting deal flow.

Key Responsibilities

• Conduct daily outbound cold calls to business owners, property owners, tenants, and decision-makers

• Qualify prospects by gathering information such as:

o current location

o lease expiration

o square footage needs

o expansion / relocation plans

o decision-making timeline

• Schedule qualified discovery calls and meetings directly for the broker

• Maintain and update all lead activity within Pipedrive CRM

• Build and maintain prospect databases and call lists, comfortable with AI

• Research local businesses, owners, and companies for outreach campaigns

• Tag, segment, and organize contacts by asset type and lead stage

• Manage follow-up sequences and reactivation campaigns for dormant leads

• In client follow-up communications, attention to detail is extremely important. Please include in your introduction, one question you would ask a property owner during an initial cold call to better understand their plans for the property.

• Assist with social media support, including post scheduling, content organization, a plus

• Provide daily update and weekly performance reports

• Assist with
 follow-up and pipeline maintenance

Ideal Experience

• Previous experience as a real estate virtual assistant, inside sales rep, ISA, or cold caller

• Experience building and maintaining a database

• Data sorting

• Experience using CRM platforms, preferably Pipedrive

• Excellent spoken and written English

• Confident and professional phone presence, prospecting skills

• Strong internet connection and quiet work environment

• Highly detail-oriented and organized

• Comfortable working with KPIs and performance metrics

• Experience in social media management, content scheduling, campaign management or digital engagement is a plus

•
 monitoring

• Experience in commercial real estate, leasing, brokerage, or B2B sales is strongly preferred

Schedule

Part-time to start: 15–20 hours per week

Potential to grow into a long-term role.

Compensation

Please include your hourly rate, relevant experience, and a short voice recording introducing yourself if possible.

Applications that demonstrate strong communication, professionalism, and attention to detail will be prioritized.

title: Remote Customer Service Agent (USA HOURS)
description:
We're looking for sharp, professional communicators to join our growing team as Survey Call Agents. In this fully remote role, you'll conduct outbound calls, guide participants through structured surveys, and capture accurate, high quality responses.



This role is ideal for someone who takes pride in how they show up on a call. Can articulate, composed, and consistently professional. If you can hold a conversation with warmth and precision, we want to hear from you.



PLEASE SUBMIT A VOICE NOTE TO BE CONSIDERED. IF VOICE NOTE IS NOT SUBMITTED YOU WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED.



What we're looking for:

Clear, fluent English. Strong listening skills and a professional, polished phone presence. Reliability, punctuality, and the discipline to work independently in a remote environment.



Why join us:

Flexible remote schedule. Straightforward work with consistent expectations. A team that values clear communication and professionalism at every level.



Training:

• 2 days of paid training provided prior to starting



Probation Period:

• The first 30 days will be a performance evaluation period

• Continued salary bonuses are based on productivity, quality, and attendance



Requirements:

• Clear, fluent English with strong pronunciation and comprehension

• Reliable high-speed internet connection

• Computer with Windows 11 Pro

• Noise-cancelling headset for clear audio quality

• Quiet, professional work environment

• Ability to consistently work the required schedule



Compensation:

• Starting salary: 27,000/month (paid bi-weekly)

• Bonus for good attendance and performance

• Long-term opportunity for consistent and reliable agents

title: Senior SEO & WordPress Specialist (Local SEO)
description:
KMElectric is a growing electrical and security installation company based in Sydney, Australia. We are looking for a full-time SEO and WordPress specialist to help manage and improve our online presence.



This role is ideal for someone experienced with local SEO, WordPress websites, and how to rank service businesses on Google.



You will be responsible for improving our website performance, increasing search rankings, managing content updates, Google My Business and helping generate more leads through organic search.



This is a long-term, full-time position for someone who wants to grow with our company.



Responsibilities



• Manage and maintain our WordPress website

• Implement on-page SEO improvements

• Create and optimise service pages for local suburbs

• Improve website speed and performance

• Monitor rankings and SEO performance

• Manage Google Business Profile optimisation

• Build internal links and improve site structure

• Publish blog posts and website content

• Assist with technical SEO fixes

• Work with us to improve lead generation



Requirements



• Strong experience with WordPress

• Good understanding of SEO (especially Local SEO)

• Experience with tools like Google Search Console and Google Analytics

• Ability to optimise website content and pages for search engines

• Knowledge of site speed optimisation

• Good written English

• Reliable internet connection

• Ability to work full-time and communicate regularly

• Experience ranking service businesses in Google Maps

• Experience with Elementor or similar WordPress builders

• Basic graphic design skills

• Experience with AI tools for content writing



Working Hours



Full-time position (40 hours per week).



We are based in Australia, so some overlap with Australian business hours is preferred.



Why Work With Us



• Long-term position with a growing company

• Stable full-time work

• Opportunity to manage and grow our entire online presence

• Work directly with the business owner



Please include the following in your application:



1. Your SEO experience

2. Examples of websites you have worked on

3. Any results you have achieved (rankings, traffic growth, etc.)

4. Your monthly salary expectation

5. Your favourite SEO tool



Applications without examples of past work may not be considered.

title: Virtual Assistant - CRM Lead Manager & Appointment Setter
description:
SoCal Solar Check is a solar sales operation serving homeowners across California. We help homeowners with older solar systems upgrade to modern, high-performance systems through various financiers. Our primary one is the largest residential solar company in the US. Our lead generation is largely automated, and we're looking for a sharp, reliable virtual assistant to manage the CRM and keep the pipeline moving.



You'll be the person inside our CRM making sure no lead falls through the cracks. Our outbound SMS system generates hundreds of replies per week. Your job is to monitor those replies, classify them, engage the interested ones, and book them on the calendar so our closers can get on the phone. You'll also be responsible for enrolling fresh leads into our outbound sequences daily to keep the top of the funnel flowing.

This is not a phone sales role. You will not be making calls or closing deals. You're the operational backbone that keeps the machine running.



What You'll Do



Monitor inbound SMS replies in Close CRM and classify them using our Reply Legend (provided)

Respond to interested leads via SMS and book qualified appointments on Google Calendar

Enroll 200–250 new leads per day into outbound SMS Workflows in Close CRM

Keep lead statuses updated and accurate across the pipeline

Run a daily DNC compliance audit to ensure opt-out requests are properly handled

Post daily start-of-day and end-of-day updates in Slack

Flag anything unclear or outside your training to the team lead via Slack

Maintain lead data quality through weekly audits



Tools You'll Use



Close CRM (this is where you'll spend 90% of your time)

Slack (internal communication)

Google Calendar (appointment booking)



That's it. We keep the tech stack lean. Full training and SOPs are provided, including video walkthroughs.

What We're Looking For



Excellent written English — you'll be texting homeowners in Southern California, so your messages need to sound natural and conversational

Experience with a CRM (Close, HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar) — you don't need to know Close specifically, but you should be comfortable navigating a CRM

Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace

Detail-oriented — lead statuses, compliance, and data accuracy matter here

Responsive communicator — 15-minute max response time on Slack during working hours

Self-starter who can follow documented processes without needing constant oversight

Available to work 11 AM – 7 PM Pacific Time, Monday through Friday



Nice to Have (Not Required)



Experience in solar, real estate, or home services industries

Familiarity with Close CRM specifically

Experience with SMS-based lead engagement or appointment setting



What We Provide



Full onboarding plan with a 30-day ramp-up structure

Detailed SOPs for every task — nothing is left to guesswork

Loom video walkthroughs of every core process

Weekly check-ins during your first month, then biweekly as you ramp

Paid US holidays (6 per year)

Performance-based pay raises at the 60-day and 90-day review milestones

A clear, defined role with room to grow as the operation scales



To Apply

Send a short message (3–5 sentences) introducing yourself and answering these three questions:



Have you worked in a CRM before? If so, which one and what did you do in it?

What hours are you currently available in US Pacific Time?

This role starts at $6 - 9/hr based on experience, with performance-based raises at 60-90 days. Are you comfortable with this starting rate?



Applications that don't answer these questions will not be reviewed.

title: Australian Tax Accountant
description:
To assist an AUSTRALIAN TAX sole practitioner.



PLEASE ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE 3 YEARS EXPERIANCE WITH AUSTRALIAN TAX (GST/BAS/ITR preparation)



I have recently stared my own sole practitioner business. I would like to take someone on part time, with increasing hours as the business builds up over the next couple of years.



I am only using Xero software, making sure all clients are on it or will transfer to it.

I have only used HandiSoft software for financial reports and tax return preparation. 



I will first like some assistance and training to get better at using Xero software for financial statement prep, mapping accounts correctly and fixed asset schedule. I know the tax technical knowledge, but need to get better at the software.



Clients:

- Small business clients in various structures on Xero

- Individuals 



Services provided that will need assistance with:

- Bookkeeping & reconciling 

- Business Activity Statement preparing

- Quarterly cashflow and P&L preparation to send to clients

- Prepare financial statements in Xero 

- Tax return preparation (individuals, trusts, companies)

- Sending documents out for signing & lodging

- Prepare neat presentable Excel checklists for client onboarding and for rental schedules ect



Candidate to have 

- Exceptional Xero knowledge & skills with bookkeeping, preparation of financial statement to link with tax returns

- Sort out and shorten/simplify Xero COA to suit client needs

- Experience preparing quarterly Business Activity Statements and correctly adjusting GST on transactions

- Preparation of Australian tax returns

 Messenger

HOW TO APPLY:

title: Appointment Setter & GHL Specialist - US Home Services Marketing Agency
description:
We're a US-based agency that generates inbound leads for home service companies (construction, remodeling, HVAC, roofing, plumbing). You'll call warm leads, qualify them, and book appointments. These are NOT cold calls.

Compensation: 4-5$ per hour, full time



Experience: 

* 1 year+ in appointment setting. 

* Hands-on GoHighLevel experience (non-negotiable).



Responsibilities:

* Call every lead within 60 seconds of submission.

* Qualify using a short script (project type, timeline, location, budget).

* Book appointment for our clients directly on their calendar using GHL

* Follow ups with no-answers - double-dial, text, re-engage.

* 50 calls per day minimum.



What You Need:

* Fluent English with a neutral or American accent. DO NOT APPLY IF YOUR ENGLISH IS NOT IMPECCABLE.

* Strong internet connection (20 Mbps+) & quiet workspace - no background noise.

* Confident & engaging - you keep conversations flowing and handle objections.

* Organized & detail-oriented - every call logged accurately in GHL.

* Available to work 8 AM – 7 PM EST, Monday–Friday.



Growth: This is a long-term position. Top performers grow into Team Lead roles with salary increases.



Apply here: 



When asked "What do we value the most at our company?" - the answer is "Honesty."

title: Happy Call Team(CS)
description:
About Haulla

Haulla, a smart waste collection service by Ecube Labs, operates in major U.S. markets including Dallas, Houston, Austin, Denver, and Chicago — with plans for further expansion across North America. We help small and mid-sized businesses across the U.S. find better, more affordable waste solutions.



What You'll Do

The Happy Call Team (CS) is responsible for ensuring customers have a positive experience with Haulla service by analyzing feedback, identifying improvements, and implementing effective solutions. Core responsibilities will include:



- Customer Satisfaction & Retention: Conduct proactive satisfaction checks ("Happy Calls") to verify customer satisfaction and identify potential friction points before they escalate into churn.

- AR & Collection Management: Proactively manage and collect outstanding AR (Accounts Receivable) to improve overall collection rates while minimizing customer attrition.

- Churn Mitigation & Recovery: Identify churn risks during the collection process and implement personalized recovery plans for long-term past-due accounts to encourage service re-entry and long-term loyalty.

- Billing Dispute Resolution: Serve as the primary point of contact for customer billing disputes and grievances, providing swift and effective resolutions that restore service confidence.

- Trust Rebuilding: Leverage positive collection experiences as an opportunity to rebuild trust and enhance the overall customer lifecycle value.



What We're Looking for

- This is a full-time remote position

- Available to work during U.S. business hours (7 AM–3 PM PST), Monday to Friday.

- Strong communication and problem-solving skills

- Native-level English fluency

- Familiarity in CRM tool (e.g., HubSpot) is a plus





Good To Have

- Experience in Collection Agency(Over 3+ years)

- Experience in Call Center

- Language Skills: Proficiency in Spanish is not required but is considered a significant advantage.



What You’ll Need (System Requirements)

- A desktop or laptop computer

- A quiet home workspace

- A noise-cancelling headset



Compensation



- Base salary plus performance-based bonuses

- Total earning potential: Php 60,000–130,000+/month

- Performance-based commission structure



Interested applicants may apply through the following Google form :

title: YouTube Editor

Software: Must have Capcut, 
.
